Trichodina spp. exhibited the highest prevalence (11.45 ± 0.65%), mean intensity (6.06 ± 0.50), and abundance (0.69 ± 0.10). This protozoan was the dominant parasite and represented the principal health constraint observed. Regarding mixed infections, the association of Trichodina spp. and Chilodonella spp. was the most frequent, with nine fish co-infected by both protozoans. The conventional system showed a higher overall parasite prevalence and a greater number of infected fish, whereas the integrated system exhibited slightly higher mean intensity and parasite abundance. Conclusion: These findings suggest that the integrated system may help limit parasite transmission without eliminating the risk of infestation.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究比较了科特迪瓦鱼-生菜综合养殖系统与传统单养系统中尼罗罗非鱼（Oreochromis niloticus）的寄生虫感染状况。通过检测768尾鱼样本（每系统384尾），发现主要寄生虫为Trichodina、Chilodonella和Gyrodactylus三属，其中Trichodina spp.的感染率（11.45±0.65%）、平均强度（6.06±0.50）和丰度（0.69±0.10）最高。综合养殖系统总感染率和感染鱼数较低，但平均强度和丰度略高，表明该模式可能限制寄生虫传播但无法消除风险。

papers.title: Exploring Freshwater Fish Diversity from Kuno River, Sheopur District of Madhya Pradesh, Central India
papers.authors: Paunikar, Sanjay
papers.journal: Asian Journal of Fisheries and Aquatic Research
papers.abstract: Fish diversity and its conservation are major considerations for the sustainable use of aquatic natural resources. Fish also contribute substantially to food security and the national economy. This study prepared a systematic checklist of the fish fauna of the Kuno River and other water bodies within Kuno-Palpur National Park, Sheopur district, Madhya Pradesh. Surveys were conducted from September to December 2023. Fish were collected at different sampling sites using cast nets, drag nets, and kick nets. Species identified in the field were recorded on data sheets, photographed, and immediately released. Unidentified specimens were retained as vouchers, euthanised, and preserved in 70% ethanol. A total of 69 fish species belonging to 40 genera, 22 families, and 10 orders were recorded. Cypriniformes showed the highest diversity, with 35 species (50.72%) across five families, followed by Siluriformes, with 15 species (21.74%) across six families. Cyprinidae was the most species-rich family, with 22 species (31.88%), followed by Danionidae with eight (11.59%), Bagridae with seven (10.14%), and Channidae with four (5.80%). The assemblage comprised 57 Least Concern, six Near Threatened, four Not Evaluated, and two Vulnerable species according to the IUCN categories. The Kuno River fish fauna includes commercially important food and ornamental fishes, as well as exotic and widely distributed species.
papers.summary_cn: 对印度中央邦谢奥普尔县库诺河及库诺-帕尔普尔国家公园水域的鱼类多样性进行调查，旨在为水生资源可持续利用提供基础数据。2023年9至12月通过多种网具采集，共记录69种鱼类，隶属10目22科40属，其中鲤形目多样性最高（35种，占50.72%），鲤科为优势科（22种，31.88%）。根据IUCN红色名录，57种为无危、6种近危、4种未评估、2种易危，包含重要经济鱼类、观赏鱼及外来广布种。

papers.title: From Global Norms to Local Contestation: Explaining the Failure of  Sustainable Aquaculture Governance in Bangladesh
papers.authors: Raditya, Arie
papers.abstract: The rapid expansion of aquaculture has positioned sustainable aquaculture governance as a critical component of global environmental governance, particularly in addressing food security, economic development, and marine ecosystem protection. However, the implementation of sustainability principles in developing countries often produces uneven outcomes due to complex interactions between international norms, domestic institutions, and local political-economic conditions. This study aims to examine how global sustainable aquaculture norms are translated, adapted, and contested within Bangladesh’s shrimp aquaculture governance system. This research employed a qualitative case study approach using document analysis of peer-reviewed articles, policy documents, and reports from international organizations. The analytical framework integrates Acharya’s concept of Norm Localization with Political Ecology to explain the relationship between global governance agendas and local implementation processes. The findings indicate that sustainable aquaculture governance in Bangladesh has not failed solely because of institutional limitations or weak policy enforcement, but because international sustainability norms undergo selective adaptation within domestic political and economic structures. The results demonstrate that sustainability initiatives often prioritize export competitiveness and market compliance while generating unequal impacts among coastal communities, particularly small-scale producers. This study concludes that effective sustainable aquaculture governance requires a more inclusive approach that integrates environmental objectives with social justice, local participation, and equitable resource management. The findings contribute to broader discussions on environmental governance in the Global South.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究采用定性案例研究方法，结合规范本土化与政治生态学框架，分析全球可持续水产养殖规范在孟加拉国对虾养殖治理体系中的转化与争议。结果表明，治理失败不仅源于制度缺陷，更因国际可持续性规范在国内政治经济结构中被选择性适应，优先考虑出口竞争力和市场合规，导致沿海社区尤其是小规模生产者面临不平等影响。研究提出，有效的可持续水产养殖治理需整合环境目标与社会公正、地方参与及公平资源管理。

papers.title: Closing the loop in aquaponics: biological and physicochemical recovery of nutrients from aquaculture sludge for circular bioeconomy
papers.authors: Gerdes genannt Janßen, Luca; Elshobary, Mostafa; Ramos, Noémie; Schwenkler, Tamara; Ende, Stephan; Noke, Anja
papers.abstract: Aquaculture sludge from recirculating systems contains a substantial share of feed-derived nutrients, yet it is typically discarded despite nutrient limitations in aquaponics. In this study, tilapia sludge from a commercial RAS was treated by sealed storage, gradual acidification (pH 5), ultrasonication, aerobic mineralization, anaerobic digestion (AD), and two AD-based sequential approaches (AD pH, AD US pH). Total and dissolved fractions were quantified to assess nutrient distribution between solid-bound and dissolved pools, and treatment-dependent mineralization performance was calculated. In untreated sludge, &gt;75–90% of nitrogen, phosphorus, calcium, magnesium, and most trace elements were associated with the solid phase, whereas potassium was largely dissolved. AD variants achieved the highest nitrogen mineralization (up to ~47%) with ammonium-dominated supernatants (≈460–480 mg NH 4 –N L − ¹), while aerobic mineralization promoted nitrification and yielded nitrate-dominant nitrogen (≈257 mg NO 3 –N L − ¹). Phosphorus mobilization was primarily pH-driven, peaking under acidification (≈165 mg PO 4 –P L − ¹) and increasing after post-acidification of AD supernatants. Micronutrient responses were element-specific; manganese increased markedly under acidified and unaerated conditions, whereas dissolved iron remained low across treatments. Compared to ideal hydroponic nutrient media, most supernatants required dilution due to elevated ammonium, and iron supplementation remained necessary. Most potentially toxic elements remained in the low µg L − ¹ range and below irrigation and reported algal toxicity thresholds. Selected sludge-derived nutrient media were suitable for Arthrospira platensis cultivation to support circular nutrient reuse. In growth trials, the non-acidified AD supernatant (AD S) supported the strongest biomass and pigment performance among sludge-derived media, reaching up to 1.32 g DW L − ¹, with a chlorophyll a content of 21.7 mg L − ¹ and a C-phycocyanin content of 24.6 mg g DW − ¹. Overall, sludge mineralization shifted nutrients from bound to dissolved pools and generated distinct nutrient profiles, highlighting the importance of aligning treatment strategy with the intended downstream application in circular RAS–aquaponic systems.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究旨在解决鱼菜共生系统中循环水养殖污泥营养回收问题，通过密封储存、逐步酸化、超声处理、好氧矿化、厌氧消化（AD）及两种AD组合工艺处理罗非鱼污泥，评估营养物固液分配与矿化效率。结果表明，AD处理实现最高氮矿化（~47%），上清液以铵态氮为主；磷释放主要受pH驱动，酸化条件下磷浓度峰值达165 mg PO₄–P L⁻¹。未酸化AD上清液培养螺旋藻效果最佳，生物量达1.32 g DW L⁻¹，叶绿素a含量21.7 mg L⁻¹，C-藻蓝蛋白24.6 mg g DW⁻¹。研究强调需根据下游应用匹配污泥处理策略，以推动循环RAS-鱼菜共生系统的营养闭环。

papers.title: The Value of Correct Identification of Coastal Marine Fishes of Economic Importance: The Case of the Senegalese Tongue Sole (Pleuronectiformes: Cynoglossidae) in the Eastern Central Atlantic (Africa)
papers.authors: N’lemvo, Paul; Decru, Eva; da Costa, Luis M.; Lunkayilakio, Soleil Wamuini; Zola, Jerida Kosi; Micha, Jean-Claude; Vreven, Emmanuel J. W. M. N.
papers.abstract: The Senegalese tongue sole, Cynoglossus senegalensis, includes three junior synonyms: C. goreensis, C. guineensis and C. simulator. In addition, C. browni, originally described as a subspecies of C. senegalensis, is currently considered a valid species. Recent observations of C. senegalensis specimens showed two different mouth morphologies, with mouth angle (i) not exceeding the posterior border of the lower eye and with a narrow interorbital distance (IOD) or (ii) exceeding that level and with a wider IOD. The first group represents C. senegalensis. The second, although containing the C. browni holotype, is named C. goreensis, following name priority. A third group, with a mouth angle not exceeding the posterior border of the lower eye and with an intermediately wide IOD, was also revealed. This last group suggests that C. simulator requires revalidation. DNA barcoding results confirmed all three species. This highlights that current Cynoglossus fishery statistics are based on doubtful identifications, probably skewing IUCN assessments. A pictorial guide is proposed to ease identification and help conservation assessments of policies and sustainable management plans for these economically important marine fish species. Common names in English, French and Kikongo (DRC) are proposed to facilitate communication with concerned local communities and to better spread the preservation/conservation message.
papers.summary_cn: 该研究旨在解决塞内加尔舌鳎（Cynoglossus senegalensis）及其同物异名种的分类混淆问题。通过形态学观察和DNA条形码分析，发现该物种复合体实际包含三个有效种：C. senegalensis、C. goreensis（含C. browni）及需重新确认的C. simulator。当前渔业统计基于错误鉴定，可能影响IUCN评估，研究提供了图文鉴定指南并建议统一英、法、刚果语俗名以促进保护管理。

papers.title: Expression of Concern: A comparative analysis of microplastic contamination in hermit crab Clibanarius rhabdodactylus Forest, 1953, inhabiting intertidal and subtidal Coastal habitat of Gujarat state
papers.summary_cn: 针对寄居蟹Clibanarius rhabdodactylus在古吉拉特邦潮间带和潮下带栖息地中的微塑料污染进行比较分析，旨在评估不同生境下的污染差异。研究通过采集样本并检测微塑料含量，揭示潮间带与潮下带个体间的污染水平差异。

papers.title: Mitochondrial DNA markers reveal panmixia and new sister lineage in the eastern Red Sea mesopelagic fish
papers.authors: Lim, Kah Kheng; Angulo-Preckler, Carlos; Afiq-Rosli, Lutfi; Pieribone, Vincent A.; Qurban, Mohammad A.; Duarte, Carlos M.
papers.abstract: Abstract Cryptic diversity in mesopelagic fish is increasingly documented across the Indo-Pacific, but remains understudied in the Red Sea, a region known for its high endemism and unique ecological conditions. We investigated cryptic diversity in Benthosema spp. and population genetic structure in the two most abundant mesopelagic fishes in the eastern Red Sea, the Benthosema pterotum species complex and the endemic Vinciguerria mabahiss . Using concatenated mitochondrial ( 12S , 16S , and COI ) sequences from 275 V. mabahiss and 84 Benthosema specimens, we detected panmictic populations in both species. Both species showed high haplotype diversity and signatures of recent demographic expansion, supported by star-like haplotype networks, negative neutrality tests, and Bayesian skyline plots. Phylogenetic analysis revealed a cryptic lineage ( Benthosema cf. pterotum ) in the eastern Red Sea, forming a sister lineage within the genus. Its genetic similarity with Gulf of Oman populations suggests ongoing gene flow through the Strait of Bab-el-Mandeb. These findings challenge current taxonomic frameworks and highlight the importance of accurate species delimitation for biodiversity monitoring and fisheries management. High genetic connectivity and demographic expansion in both mesopelagic fish species suggest resilience driven by large effective population sizes and high dispersal potential. These results provide the first population genetic baseline for the largest fish stock in the eastern Red Sea and support future efforts to assess adaptive potential in a warming marginal sea.
papers.summary_cn: 利用线粒体DNA标记（12S、16S、COI）对红海东部两种主要中层鱼类（Benthosema pterotum复合种和特有种Vinciguerria mabahiss）进行种群遗传分析，发现两者均呈现panmixia（随机交配）和近期种群扩张信号。系统发育分析揭示红海东部存在Benthosema属的一个新隐存姐妹谱系（Benthosema cf. pterotum），其与阿曼湾种群的遗传相似性表明通过曼德海峡存在基因流。该发现挑战了现有分类框架，为红海东部最大渔业资源提供了首个种群遗传基线，对生物多样性监测和渔业管理具有重要指导意义。

papers.title: Leaching of Di(2-ethylhexyl) Phthalate from Polyvinyl Chloride Microplastics in Synthetic Freshwater, Seawater, and Fish In Vitro Digestion Fluids
papers.authors: Cai, Rui; Sharma, Parul; Rhodes, Victoria; Thennakoon, Dhanuka; Scott, Justin; Weaver, Jimmie; Minghetti, Matteo; Gonzalez-Estrella, Jorge
papers.summary_cn: 研究聚氯乙烯微塑料中邻苯二甲酸二(2-乙基己基)酯在合成淡水、海水及鱼类体外消化液中的浸出规律。通过模拟不同环境介质，揭示微塑料在鱼类消化道内释放增塑剂的潜在风险。结果表明，消化液条件显著促进DEHP释放，对鱼类健康构成威胁。

papers.title: Anisakis Larvae in Atlantic Wild Fish: Food Safety Hazards Driven by Trendy Diets
papers.authors: Duarte, Rafael C.; Ramos, Paula; Santos, Maria J.; Barracosa, Rita; Caldeira, Mónica; Magalhães, Inês; Calado, Ricardo
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Zoonotic parasites are an increasingly recognised challenge for seafood safety. Anisakid nematodes currently represent the most significant fish‐borne parasitic threat in Atlantic wild fisheries. Recent regional surveys and global syntheses suggest significant increases in the prevalence and intensity of anisakid infections across multiple commercially important fish species, raising concerns for public health, marketability and consumer confidence. At the same time, the growing popularity of raw and lightly processed seafood has increased human exposure to anisakids, potentially amplifying infection risk independently of ecological changes in parasite abundance. Here, we synthesise current knowledge on anisakid parasitism in Atlantic fish and critically examine the interacting mechanisms that may be driving these trends. We highlight the roles of climate‐driven ecosystem change, recovery and redistribution of marine mammal definitive hosts, shifts in fish host ecology, evolving fishing and post‐capture handling practices, changing seafood consumption patterns, and major advances in parasite detection and diagnostics. While improved surveillance has undoubtedly increased reporting, converging evidence suggests that changes in host–parasite dynamics are also occurring. We further discuss practical mitigation options across the seafood value chain, from onboard handling and processing to retail, food service and consumer awareness, emphasising the need for coordinated, risk‐based approaches. Collectively, these developments challenge the long‐standing perception of wild fish, especially when consumed raw or lightly processed, as inherently safe, underscoring the importance of integrating ecological insight, consumer behaviour, technological innovation and public‐health guidance to ensure sustainable fisheries and safe seafood consumption.
papers.summary_cn: 大西洋野生鱼类中异尖线虫幼虫感染率与强度显著上升，对食品安全构成威胁。研究综合分析了气候驱动的生态系统变化、海洋哺乳动物宿主恢复与分布、鱼类宿主生态改变、捕捞与加工方式演变、生鲜消费趋势及检测技术进步等交互机制。尽管监测加强提高了报告率，但宿主-寄生虫动态变化确实存在。建议从船上处理到零售消费全链条采取风险管控措施，以保障可持续渔业和生食安全。

papers.title: Estimating spawning salmon abundance from visual surveys: a hierarchical model of arrival and exit dynamics
papers.authors: Thompson, Patrick L.; Akenhead, Scott; Louie, Colette
papers.abstract: Spawner abundance is a fundamental variable for salmon management models, but conventional methods (trapezoidal area under the curve) do not estimate the precision of abundance, and risk being biased by an assumed residence time. Here we present a hierarchical model that predicts visual counts of spawners by modelling the process and timing of spawner arrivals and exits. Our model provides annual estimates of spawner abundance, arrival timing, arrival spread, exit timing, and exit spread. By directly estimating these parameters and integrating uncertainty into abundance estimates, our approach improves the accuracy and reliability of spawner abundance estimates. We first demonstrate how the model accurately recovers parameters from simulated data, and then demonstrate its application by estimating 25 years of spawner abundance of wild sockeye salmon in the Okanagan River (BC, Canada). Our median estimated residence time of 9.1 days is shorter than the constant 11 days previously assumed for this population, and has considerable interannual variation (6.2–16.5 days). Thus, our estimated abundances are 15.7% higher, on average, but annual deviations range from -43 to +51%.
papers.summary_cn: 该研究提出一种分层模型，通过模拟产卵鲑鱼到达和离开的动态过程，从视觉调查数据估算产卵丰度。模型直接估算丰度、到达/离开时间及其离散度，并整合不确定性，相比传统梯形面积法更准确可靠。对加拿大Okanagan River红鲑25年数据的应用显示，中位停留时间9.1天短于此前假设的11天，且年际变异显著（6.2–16.5天），导致丰度估算平均提高15.7%，但年际偏差范围为-43%至+51%。

papers.title: Community Structure and Functional Prediction of Gut Microbiota in Mandarin Fish (Siniperca Chuatsi) Under Different Culture and Feeding Conditions
papers.authors: Wang, Yayu; Niu, Chen; Jiang, Xiaoyu; Zhang, Jinpeng; Wang, Shu; Gong, Cuiping; Hu, Dayan
papers.abstract: This study investigated the effects of culture systems and feed types on the gut microbiota of mandarin fish (Siniperca chuatsi), using three production culture modes: pond–live bait (CE), pond–artificial feed (CS), and RAS–artificial feed (GS). Under identical pond culture conditions, CS fish fed compound feed had higher relative abundances of carbohydrate-metabolizing Bacteroidota and Firmicutes than CE. The CS group showed higher α-diversity, but β-diversity analysis indicated no significant community difference (p = 0.36), demonstrating that feed replacement only induced mild microbial shifts. LEfSe analysis uncovered 17 differential taxa: homeostasis-related genera enriched in CS, while the lipid-adapted Macellibacteroides prevailed in CE. Under identical artificial feed conditions, switching culture mode from pond (CS) to industrial RAS (GS) drastically reduced gut microbial diversity and simplified community structure. GS exhibited a sharp rise in Fusobacteriota, with Cetobacterium (64.94%) becoming the single dominant genus. α-diversity was lower in GS than CS, and β-diversity confirmed highly distinct community profiles between the two groups (p = 0.004). LEfSe detected 43 differential taxa with diverse metabolic genera abundant in CS. No PICRUSt2-inferred KEGG pathways remained significant after FDR correction in the above two comparison groups, so these functional trends are only for reference.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以鳜（Siniperca chuatsi）为对象，探究养殖系统（池塘vs.循环水养殖系统RAS）和饲料类型（活饵vs.人工配合饲料）对肠道微生物群落的影响。池塘养殖条件下，投喂配合饲料的鳜肠道中碳水化合物代谢相关菌群（Bacteroidota和Firmicutes）丰度升高，α多样性增加，但β多样性无显著差异（p=0.36），表明饲料替换仅引起温和的微生物群落变化。在相同人工饲料条件下，从池塘转为RAS养殖显著降低了肠道微生物多样性，Fusobacteriota急剧上升，Cetobacterium（64.94%）成为绝对优势菌属，β多样性显示两组群落结构高度分化（p=0.004）。PICRUSt2功能预测经FDR校正后无显著差异通路，仅具参考价值。

papers.title: Partial Replacement of Fish Meal with Fish Scale Meal Enhances Body Color Brightness and Iridophore Development in Koi (Cyprinus carpio var. koi)
papers.authors: Gao, Shengyu; Xu, Xiaolong; Ding, Tong; Cheng, Yunxin; Zhang, Jiayue; Zheng, Huiyi; Zhou, Zuoqin; Liu, En; Xu, Gaoxiao; He, Chaofan
papers.abstract: Body color brightness is a key determinant of ornamental value in koi, yet nutritional strategies targeting structural coloration mediated by iridophores remain underexplored. Fish scale meal (FSM), an abundant fishery by-product, contains guanine and collagen, which may contribute to structural coloration and body brightness. This study evaluated the effects of partial replacement of fish meal with FSM on growth performance, body color parameters, pigment accumulation, iridophore density, and iridophore-related gene expression in koi. A total of 384 koi with an initial body weight of 19.02 ± 0.18 g were randomly assigned to six dietary treatments for 8 weeks, with FSM inclusion levels ranging from 0% to 9.55%, corresponding to 0–100% replacement of dietary fish meal. Growth performance, including final body weight, weight gain rate, and specific growth rate, decreased with increasing FSM inclusion. Body lightness (L*) and scale guanine content increased progressively with FSM level and reached their highest values at 9.55% FSM, whereas redness (a*), yellowness (b*), and total carotenoid content showed the opposite trend. Iridophore density was significantly higher in the 3.82–5.73% FSM groups than in the other treatments. The expression of iridophore-related genes, including sox10, pax3, ltk, alx4a, and foxd3, showed non-linear responses and generally reached higher levels at moderate FSM inclusion, whereas pka showed an opposite transcript pattern. Overall, dietary FSM inclusion elicited trait-dependent responses in koi. Low or no FSM inclusion was preferable for maintaining growth, intermediate inclusion was more favorable for iridophore development, whereas higher FSM inclusion enhanced brightness-related traits. These findings suggest that FSM should be used according to the intended production objective, with inclusion levels adjusted for growth maintenance, iridophore-related coloration improvement, or brightness enhancement.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以锦鲤为对象，探究鱼鳞粉（FSM）部分替代鱼粉对其体色亮度、虹彩细胞发育及生长的影响。结果显示，FSM替代水平达9.55%时，体色亮度（L*）和鳞片鸟嘌呤含量显著提升，但生长性能（终末体重、增重率等）随替代比例增加而下降；中等替代水平（3.82–5.73%）可显著提高虹彩细胞密度，并上调sox10、pax3等虹彩细胞相关基因表达。研究表明，FSM的添加需根据生产目标调整：低水平维持生长，中水平促进虹彩细胞发育，高水平增强体色亮度。

papers.title: Comment on “On the pass‐through rate of the Nutrition North Canada subsidy”
papers.authors: Galloway, Tracey; Li, Nicholas
papers.journal: Canadian Journal of Agricultural Economics/Revue canadienne d'agroeconomie
papers.abstract: Abstract Naylor, Deaton and Ker provide estimates of Nutrition North Canada subsidy pass‐through using data we collected and an identification strategy we devised. They propose an alternative econometric specification based on estimating passthrough for separate monopoly and non‐monopoly sub‐samples and aggregating the coefficients using subsidy share weights. They argue that this specification is more appropriate for estimating overall subsidy pass‐through and conclude that its application to our data provides evidence for full subsidy pass‐through. We show that their conclusions are not warranted by making two distinct but related points. First, we show that conclusions based on their specification are not robust to two changes in the estimating sample. Correcting two subsidy assignment and one monopoly classification error in the original data set, or using a time period more relevant for comparing heterogeneous effects across monopoly and non‐monopoly communities, leads to estimates that either reinforce our original finding of incomplete passthrough or that are too imprecise to be informative. Second, we provide a graphical illustration and power calculation to make a more general point about the appropriateness and limitations of the type of sub‐sample analysis they propose in settings with limited sample size and statistical power.
papers.summary_cn: 该评论针对Nutrition North Canada补贴传导率研究展开方法论辩论。原作者指出，评论者提出的基于垄断与非垄断子样本的替代计量模型存在样本分类错误和统计效力不足问题。通过修正数据错误和调整时间窗口，重新分析显示补贴传导不完全的结论依然成立，或估计结果精度不足。研究强调在有限样本条件下进行子样本分析的局限性。

papers.title: First insights into oceanic manta ray movements in Japan using satellite telemetry
papers.authors: Ozaki, Rikako; Kamotani, Yuko; Kamotani, Masato; Chin, Andrew; Ravasi, Timothy; Erdmann, Mark V.
papers.abstract: Abstract Japanese waters represent the northern distributional limit of the western Pacific distribution of the oceanic manta ray ( Mobula birostris) , yet movement ecology in this region remains poorly understood. We report movements of the first satellite‐tagged individual in Japan. High‐resolution depth–time series data documented repeated dives to 300 m and a maximum depth of 1082 m, with deeper use occurring predominantly at night. The individual undertook repeated long‐distance movements between the Kerama Islands and Miyako Islands, including multiple transits across the Okinawa‐Miyako Submarine Plateau and associated bathymetric features. Although based on a single tracked individual, these observations provide the first high‐resolution movement data of M. birostris in Japanese waters and highlight key hypotheses regarding habitat use and connectivity for future investigation.
papers.summary_cn: 利用卫星追踪技术首次揭示了日本海域 oceanic manta ray（Mobula birostris）的运动模式。研究发现该个体反复下潜至300米，最大深度达1082米，夜间深潜更为频繁。个体在Kerama群岛与Miyako群岛之间进行长距离移动，多次穿越冲绳-宫古海底高原等地形特征。尽管仅基于单一个体追踪，这些高分辨率数据为理解该物种在日本海域的栖息地利用与种群连通性提供了关键假设。

papers.title: Dynamics of Growth–Feeding Mechanisms in Japanese Anchovy Larvae Under Different Environmental Conditions
papers.authors: Tanaka, Shota; Togoshi, Shizuna; Germain, Etienne; Yasue, Naotaka; Nakamura, Masahiro; Robert, Dominique; Takasuka, Akinori
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT The linkage between growth rate and feeding success in fish larvae has received much attention as a potential indicator of future growth and survival potential. Given the increasing evidence that the growth–survival relationship is highly variable, the growth–feeding linkage would also exhibit variable dynamics among cohorts of the same population under different environmental conditions. Here, we demonstrated the dynamics of the growth–feeding linkage in Japanese anchovy larvae across multiple cohort samples collected by commercial trawlers operating in the Kii Channel, Japan. Three growth–feeding mechanisms that assume potential advantages of relatively large somatic size, high growth rate, and early morphological development for feeding success were tested for each cohort sample through both qualitative and quantitative indices of feeding success, including prey presence/absence, number, size, and carbon content. All the mechanisms were supported by at least certain cohorts, but none of them was universally effective across all cohorts. Hence, individual somatic size, growth rate per se, and morphological development influenced prey presence/absence, number, size, and carbon content at variable degrees among the different cohorts considered. Our results suggest that the relative contribution of the three growth characteristics to feeding success would vary under different environmental conditions. The observed dynamics of the growth–feeding mechanisms would influence dynamics in future growth potential and recruitment mechanisms. Meta‐regression analyses further suggested that more diverse prey size composition, smaller prey, and higher temperature would enhance the strength of the three growth–feeding mechanisms. Further investigating when and how each growth characteristic influences feeding success will contribute to understanding which individuals are more likely to achieve successful feeding, growth, and survival in a given set of environmental conditions.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以日本鳀仔鱼为对象，通过商业拖网采集Kii Channel多个cohort样本，探究不同环境条件下生长-摄食关联的动态变化。采用定性与定量摄食成功指标（包括饵料有无、数量、大小及碳含量），检验了三种生长-摄食机制（体型优势、高生长率优势、形态发育优势）的有效性。结果表明，各机制仅在特定cohort中得到支持，无普遍适用性，且三种生长特征对摄食成功的相对贡献随环境条件变化。Meta回归分析进一步揭示，饵料大小组成多样化、小型饵料及高水温可增强上述机制强度。

papers.title: Improvements in length structure, reproductive indices, and spawning biomass following strengthened fisheries management: evidence from the common sardine (<i>Strangomera bentincki</i>) off central-southern Chile
papers.authors: Monsalve Tequén, Eveling; Cubillos, Luis A.; Vásquez, Sebastián I.
papers.abstract: Fisheries management measures are expected to enhance the demographic structure and reproductive capacity of exploited fish populations, particularly in short-lived, fast-growing small pelagic species. We evaluated long-term changes in key demographic traits of common sardine (Strangomera bentincki) off central-southern Chile in relation to major regulatory milestones implemented between 1991 and 2023. Biological data from fishery monitoring programs were analyzed across three management periods (1991-2000: open access, 2001-2012: political decisions, and 2013-2023: scientifically supported decisions), focusing on length-structure, spawning biomass (SSB), fishing mortality (F), reproductive activity, condition factor, and length-based indicators. Significant differences were observed among the three periods. The second period was characterized by a reduced median length, delayed reproductive peak, high F, and low SSB, consistent with overfishing. In contrast, the most recent period exhibited consistently lower fishing mortality, increased spawning biomass, improved length-structure with a higher proportion of large and repeat spawners, and an earlier and more intense winter reproductive peak. Length-based indicators showed improved conservation of immature and large individuals and improved alignment with optimal yield benchmarks. Results demonstrate that strengthened, science-based fisheries management has positively influenced the demographic structure and reproductive dynamics of common sardine, underscoring the importance of sustained low fishing mortality in short-lived pelagic fisheries in the region.
papers.summary_cn: 评估智利中南部强化渔业管理（1991-2023年）对普通沙丁鱼（Strangomera bentincki）种群结构的影响。基于渔业监测数据，比较开放捕捞期（1991-2000）、政治决策期（2001-2012）和科学决策期（2013-2023）的体长结构、产卵生物量（SSB）和繁殖指标。结果显示，科学管理期捕捞死亡率（F）持续降低，SSB增加，大个体和重复产卵者比例上升，冬季繁殖高峰提前且强度增大，体长指标更接近最优产量基准。研究表明，基于科学的低捕捞死亡率管理有效恢复了短生命周期小型中上层鱼类的种群结构。

papers.title: When Fish Fails to Protect: Interrogating the South Asian Cardiometabolic Paradox in the Era of Aquaculture Transition
papers.authors: Rizwan, Abu Ansar Md
papers.abstract: Abstract South Asia presents a striking nutritional paradox: populations among the world’s highest fish consumers carry disproportionate cardiometabolic risk at body mass index levels well below disease thresholds for European populations. Marine fish is established as cardioprotective in fatty-fish-consuming coastal populations, yet this benefit appears to break down in South Asian contexts. This commentary interrogates four interlocking mechanisms. First, aquaculture-driven species substitution has replaced omega-3-rich species such as hilsa and coastal sardines with leaner farmed varieties offering only a fraction of the cardioprotective lipid profile. Second, deep frying in high-omega-6 oils substantially degrades polyunsaturated fatty acid bioavailability. Third, heavy metal co-contamination in arsenic- and mercury-affected watersheds may attenuate omega-3 benefits. Fourth, urbanization is eroding fish intake among the highest-risk subgroups, while aggregate dietary data obscure this heterogeneity. Generic eat-more-fish guidance is insufficient; ethnicity-sensitive, sustainability-conscious guidance on species, preparation, and contamination risk is needed to realize fish’s cardioprotective potential in South Asia.
papers.summary_cn: 该研究探讨南亚地区高鱼类消费与心血管代谢风险并存的悖论，指出水产养殖转型中物种替代（如用低脂养殖鱼替代富含omega-3的野生鱼）、高omega-6油脂油炸、重金属污染及城市化导致的鱼类摄入不均等四重机制，削弱了鱼类的心血管保护作用。研究呼吁针对南亚人群制定兼顾物种选择、烹饪方式与污染风险的膳食指南。

papers.title: Effects of experimentally manipulated cortisol and nutrition on wound healing capacity in a teleost fish
papers.authors: Zolderdo, Aaron; Reid, C.H.; Lawrence, Michael; Algera, Dirk A.; Peiman, Kathryn S; Gilmour, Kathleen; Fast, Mark D.; Cooke, S.J.
papers.abstract: Wound healing is a complex multi-system process that enables organs and tissues to re-establish their form and function post-injury. Exposure to stress and nutritional restrictions results in energetic trade-offs at a physiological level, usually at the expense of immunity and tissue repair. Relatively few studies have focused on how stress and nutrition mediate immune function and healing capacity in fishes. We subjected wild-caught pumpkinseed (Lepomis gibbosus (Linnaeus, 1758)) to a subcutaneous incision (a standardized wound) while experimentally manipulating plasma cortisol levels (via a slow-release cortisol implant) and nutrition (via restricting food intake) to evaluate how these affected wound healing over time (2, 7, and 14 d). Wound healing was poorest for cortisol-treated fed fish at 7 d post-implant. While cortisol implants resulted in lymphocyte apoptosis and neutropenia, which are well-described immunological responses to increased cortisol concentrations, fasting had little effect. Reproductively active males had different leukocyte counts than non-reproductive males, though the direction varied with leukocyte type, suggesting a trade-off in immune response during reproduction. The negative influence of cortisol on tissue repair and inflammation aligns with the wound healing literature across taxa. However, the ability of fasting to reduce these negative effects was unexpected and deserves further study.
papers.summary_cn: 通过慢释放皮质醇植入和限食实验，探究皮质醇与营养对太阳鱼伤口愈合的影响。结果显示，皮质醇处理组在7天时愈合最差，并引发淋巴细胞凋亡和中性粒细胞减少，而限食影响较小。繁殖期雄鱼白细胞计数与非繁殖期存在差异，表明繁殖期间存在免疫权衡。皮质醇对组织修复的抑制作用与跨物种研究一致，但限食缓解该负面效应的机制尚需进一步研究。

papers.title: Long-Term Exposure–Recovery to 20 nm Polystyrene Nanoplastic Particles Is Associated with Residual Nuclear Stress in a Marine Fish Cell Line
papers.authors: Yan, Lulu; Su, Jiaqi; Zhu, Changbo
papers.abstract: Nanoplastic particles are increasingly detected in aquatic environments, yet whether cellular stress responses persist after exposure cessation remains unclear. Here, Lateolabrax maculatus rostral (LMR) cells from spotted sea bass were continuously exposed for up to 30 passages (105 days) to nominal 20 nm carboxylated fluorescent polystyrene particles (20 μg/mL), followed by 10 particle-free passages (recovery). Long-term exposure was associated with reduced proliferation and pronounced changes in cell surface morphology and ultrastructure. Although NP-associated fluorescence became undetectable during recovery, several nuclear-associated alterations persisted throughout the 10-passage recovery period, including TEM-observed nuclear-envelope alterations, filamentous actin (F-actin) reorganization, and sustained elevation of phosphorylated H2AX (γ-H2AX) foci. Several nuclear pore complex (NPC) genes were downregulated during exposure and rebounded after particle removal, whereas the nuclear-to-cytoplasmic distribution of proliferating cell nuclear antigen (PCNA) remained shifted. Together, these findings indicate that prolonged exposure to this nanoscale polystyrene particle formulation was associated with nuclear stress responses that did not fully resolve within the 10-passage recovery window in fish cells. Because bulk-polymer and chemical-extract (leachate) controls were not included, nanoscale-specific effects cannot be distinguished from contributions of polymer chemistry, surface functionalization, fluorescent dye, or other formulation-related effects.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以花鲈吻端细胞系为模型，连续暴露于20 nm聚苯乙烯纳米塑料颗粒（20 μg/mL）30代（105天）后，再经10代无颗粒恢复培养。长期暴露导致细胞增殖减缓、表面形态及超微结构显著改变；尽管恢复期荧光信号消失，但核膜异常、肌动蛋白重组及γ-H2AX焦点持续升高表明核应激未完全消退。增殖细胞核抗原的核质分布偏移及核孔复合体基因表达波动进一步证实残余核损伤。由于未设置聚合物及化学提取物对照，无法区分纳米尺度效应与配方相关影响。

papers.title: Critical review of the development and integration of smart (active and intelligent) packaging on fresh fish products
papers.authors: Ramlah, Sitti; Novrain, Abel Yandi; Hidayat, Serli Hatul; Ainani, Andi Fadiah; Majumder, Soumya; Dirpan, Andi
papers.abstract: Fresh fish is a highly perishable commodity due to its high water content, relatively neutral initial pH, abundance of free amino acids and non-protein nitrogen compounds, as well as PUFA content that is prone to oxidation. As a result, quality deterioration continues to occur even when conventionally packaged. This critical review aims to synthesize up-to-date, holistic, and comprehensive research evidence regarding the development and integration mechanisms of smart packaging in fresh fish products, given that previous literature tends to be fragmented or focused on specific packaging materials. The methodology involved a critical review of publications related to the mechanisms of fish deterioration, active packaging systems, intelligent packaging systems, and patterns of integration between the two, as summarized in schematic mechanisms and study compilations. The analysis shows that fish spoilage is driven by the synergy between autolysis, lipid oxidation, and microbial decomposition, which produce volatile amines that increase pH and TVB-N. Active packaging is effective at suppressing microbes, slowing oxidation, reducing TVB-N accumulation, and maintaining sensory quality, especially at low temperatures. Intelligent packaging plays a role in monitoring product conditions. The integration of both systems as smart packaging provides a synergistic effect, namely delaying spoilage and providing real-time information for distribution decisions. These findings highlight that the integration of smart packaging is no longer merely a packaging innovation for the future, but a strategic solution ready to be adopted by the fisheries industry to improve product safety, efficiency, competitiveness, and supply chain sustainability in the global fish market.
papers.summary_cn: 该综述旨在整合鲜鱼产品智能包装（活性与智能包装）的开发与集成机制，以解决传统包装下鲜鱼因高水分、中性pH、游离氨基酸及易氧化PUFA导致的快速腐败问题。通过分析自溶、脂质氧化和微生物分解的协同作用，发现活性包装可有效抑制微生物、延缓氧化并降低TVB-N积累，而智能包装则能实时监测产品状态。两者集成的智能包装不仅能延缓腐败，还能为分销决策提供实时信息，是提升渔业产品安全、供应链效率及全球竞争力的战略方案。

papers.title: Fenomenologi Persepsi Mahasiswi FISH UNJ terhadap Toxic Positivity di Instagram
papers.authors: Dhesi Kusuma Wulandari; Marisa Puspita Sary
papers.journal: TUTURAN: Jurnal Ilmu Komunikasi, Sosial dan Humani...
papers.abstract: This study discusses the perception of female students at the Faculty of Social Sciences and Law, Universitas Negeri Jakarta, toward toxic positivity as a form of communication on Instagram. Instagram has become a digital space for students to express identity, share experiences, and build interpersonal interaction through stories, captions, comments, and direct messages. However, positive messages on Instagram do not always provide emotional support. In certain situations, motivational messages may ignore negative emotions and create pressure to always appear happy, strong, and productive. This study uses a qualitative approach with a phenomenological method. Data were collected through in-depth interviews with two female student informants, identified as LK and SK. The findings show that toxic positivity is perceived as a digital communication practice that appears positive but may minimize emotional experiences when delivered without empathy. Toxic positivity appears through motivational content, short comments, and personal advice that encourage individuals to immediately think positively. The study implies that digital support should be expressed contextually by validating emotions and providing empathetic responses.
papers.summary_cn: 非渔业相关

papers.title: Environmental performance of near-zero discharge recirculating aquaculture systems: an exergoenvironmental assessment
papers.authors: Küçük, Haydar; Akbulut, Uğur; Aydın, İlhan
papers.summary_cn: 采用火用环境评估方法，分析近零排放循环水养殖系统（RAS）的环境表现。研究聚焦于系统能量与物质流的环境影响，揭示关键环节的生态效率。结果表明，近零排放RAS在减少废水排放的同时，需优化能源消耗以提升整体环境可持续性。

papers.title: Integrated Multi-Omics Characterization of Bacillus altitudinis B16 as a Potential Probiotic in Aquaculture
papers.authors: Nguyen, Co Thi Kim; Dang, Ngoc Thi Thuy; Pham, Ty Viet; Dang, Dat Quoc Bui; Dinh, Hung Tan; Nguyen, Hoang Duc
papers.summary_cn: 本研究对潜在水产益生菌Bacillus altitudinis B16进行整合多组学表征，旨在评估其在水产养殖中的应用潜力。通过基因组、转录组及代谢组分析，揭示了该菌株的益生特性、代谢途径及安全性。结果表明，B16具有抗病原菌、产酶及免疫调节功能，可作为水产养殖中的候选益生菌。

papers.title: Hybrid QR-LSTM model for accurate classification of anoxia and non-anoxia conditions in IoT-based aquaculture systems
papers.authors: Arepalli, Peda Gopi; Jairam Naik, K.
papers.summary_cn: 提出一种混合QR-LSTM模型，用于在基于物联网的水产养殖系统中准确分类缺氧与非缺氧状态。该方法结合了QR分解与LSTM网络，旨在提升实时水质监测的异常检测精度。

papers.title: The Paradox of Availability: A Quantitative Analysis of Veterinary Medicinal Products for Aquaculture in Europe Between 2018 and 2026
papers.authors: Chambers, Lauren; Jansen, Wiebke; Palić, Dušan; Fabris, Andrea; Schonbrodt, Alain; Nepejchalová, Leona; De Briyne, Nancy
papers.abstract: Availability of veterinary medicinal products is a critical determinant of health, welfare, and economic sustainability in European aquaculture. This study assessed the changes in the authorization and reported market availability of veterinary medicines for finfish in the European Union (EU) and European Free Trade Association (EFTA) between 2018 and 2026, by comparing and analyzing data on veterinary medicinal products for aquatic species from the Heads of Medicines Agencies (HMA), the FishMedPlus Coalition, and the European Medicines Agency Union Product Database. The results revealed a wide divergence between regulatory authorization and reported availability. While the total number of authorized VMPs nominally increased from 304 in 2018 to 332 in 2025 (+9.2%), the number of reported unique active substances available declined (−16.7%). Crucially, the analysis of 2025 data indicates that only 26.5% of authorized products were reported to be actively available on the market, creating a “paper market” that masks severe therapeutic gaps, particularly in minor fish species such as seabass, seabream, carp, and trout sectors. Potential key drivers identified were limited markets, industry consolidation, increased burden related to stricter environmental requirements, as well as enlarged administrative and financial burdens. Despite EU legislative mechanisms designed to support limited markets, the sector faces stagnation in therapeutic diversity, necessitating continued reliance on the off-label use of medicines.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究评估了2018至2026年间欧盟及欧洲自由贸易联盟地区水产养殖用兽药（VMPs）的审批与市场可及性变化。通过对比HMA、FishMedPlus联盟及欧洲药品管理局数据库数据，发现审批授权与市场实际供应存在显著脱节：尽管授权VMPs数量从304增至332（+9.2%），但实际可用的活性物质种类减少16.7%，2025年仅26.5%的授权产品在市场上活跃供应，形成掩盖治疗空白的“纸面市场”，尤其影响鲈鱼、鲷鱼、鲤鱼和鳟鱼等次要养殖品种。关键驱动因素包括市场有限、行业整合、更严格的环境要求及行政财务负担增加，导致治疗多样性停滞，需持续依赖标签外用药。

papers.title: Biological, freshwater, and marine drivers of age at maturity in wild Chinook Salmon
papers.authors: Gosselin, Jennifer; Sandford, Benjamin P; O'Brien, Caitlin S.; Buhle, Eric
papers.journal: Canadian Journal of Fisheries and Aquatic Sciences
papers.abstract: Understanding variation in age at maturity is important for endangered species recovery because older, larger adults contribute disproportionately to the next generation. Conditions in early life stages may have underappreciated impacts on age at maturity. Our study objective was to associate adult age of individually tagged wild, spring/summer Chinook salmon (Oncorhynchus tshawytscha) outmigrating from the Snake River (Idaho and Washington, USA) in 1998–2020 with covariates measured during juvenile and subadult stages. We used a hierarchical Bayesian ordinal probit regression model to estimate statistical effects of juvenile body length, seasonal migration timing or river temperature, transported or in-river hydrosystem passage, river flow, and a large-scale ocean index. Results indicated notable carryover effects consistent with underlying biological mechanisms related to growth and development, in which shorter juvenile length and later seasonal migration timing were associated with older adults. These biological and behavioural factors were more important than riverine or marine environmental conditions examined. Our study suggests that managers and decision makers should consider carryover effects from the juvenile life stage on age structure in conjunction with survival.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究利用1998-2020年Snake River野生春/夏季Chinook Salmon（Oncorhynchus tshawytscha）的个体标记数据，通过分层贝叶斯有序probit回归模型，分析幼鱼体长、洄游时间、河流温度、水坝通过方式及海洋指数等因子对成鱼成熟年龄的影响。结果表明，幼鱼体长较短和洄游时间较晚与成鱼年龄增大显著相关，这些生物和行为因素的carryover效应比河流或海洋环境条件更为关键。研究建议管理决策者应结合幼鱼阶段的carryover效应来评估年龄结构对种群恢复的影响。

papers.title: Structural and Oxidative Properties of HPMC-Based Fish Oil Oleogels Produced by Emulsion-Template Protocols
papers.authors: Viciana-Mosquera, Sofía; Franco, Daniel; Vázquez, José Antonio; Sineiro, Jorge; Antelo, Luis T.; Moreira, Ramon; Franco-Uría, Amaya
papers.summary_cn: 利用乳液模板法构建HPMC基鱼油油凝胶，研究其结构与氧化特性。该方法通过调控油凝胶的微观结构，显著影响鱼油的氧化稳定性。结果表明，HPMC基油凝胶可有效延缓鱼油氧化，为鱼油在食品中的应用提供新型载体。

papers.title: Fish Collagen Hydrolysates in Wound Healing: A Patent Review
papers.authors: Cunha Bortoluzzi, Pamela; Mello Chaves, Rebeca; de Azevedo Marques, Cecília; Barroso Pereira, Maíra; Alves Marques, Lana Grasiela; Silveira Vieira, Rodrigo; Karine Andrade, Fábia
papers.summary_cn: 该专利综述聚焦于鱼胶原蛋白水解物在伤口愈合中的应用，系统梳理了相关专利技术。研究总结了鱼胶原蛋白水解物的提取工艺、生物活性及其促进伤口修复的机制，为渔业资源高值化利用提供了新方向。

papers.title: Sexual Segregation of Blacktip Reef Sharks (Carcharhinus melanopterus) at Mitita Island, South Morotai, North Maluku, Indonesia
papers.authors: Danendra, Muhammad Raissa; Sunarto; Ismail, Mochamad Rudyansyah; Mukharror, Darmawan Ahmad; Prihadi, Donny Juliandri
papers.journal: Asian Journal of Fisheries and Aquatic Research
papers.abstract: Sexual segregation may influence habitat use, social interactions, and population organisation in reef-associated sharks. However, habitat-based and social segregation in blacktip reef sharks (Carcharhinus melanopterus) at Mitita Island remains insufficiently understood. This study investigated habitat-based and social patterns of sexual segregation in blacktip reef sharks (Carcharhinus melanopterus) at Mitita Island, South Morotai, North Maluku. Field observations were conducted at Mitita Point and Niomi Point over eight sampling days from June to August 2024, comprising 24 dives. Individual sharks were recognised through photo-identification using natural markings on the dorsal and caudal fins. Environmental conditions, benthic cover, reef fish abundance, shark occurrence, and agonistic interactions were recorded. Eighteen individuals were identified, including 12 females and 6 males. Females occurred more frequently at Mitita Point, which had greater live coral cover, higher reef fish abundance, and calmer current conditions, whereas males were observed more frequently at Niomi Point. Exploratory Poisson regression indicated that current velocity score and salinity were associated with female occurrence; none of the measured environmental variables significantly predicted male occurrence. Analysis of “Give Way” interactions suggested that females occupied more central positions within the observed interaction network. The findings indicate sex-related differences in spatial occurrence and social interactions within the local aggregation. However, these patterns should be interpreted cautiously because the study involved a small identified population, two sampling stations, a short observation period, an observational design, and controlled feeding during diver-based surveys. Longer-term, seasonal, non-provisioned monitoring and movement-tracking approaches are required to determine whether the observed patterns persist across time and habitats.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究调查了印尼北马鲁古南莫罗泰米蒂塔岛黑鳍礁鲨（Carcharhinus melanopterus）的栖息地和社会性性别隔离模式。通过2024年6-8月24次潜水观测，利用背鳍和尾鳍自然标记进行照片识别，记录了18头个体（12雌6雄）。雌鲨更常出现在活珊瑚覆盖率高、珊瑚鱼丰富、水流平缓的米蒂塔角，而雄鲨多见于尼奥米角；泊松回归显示流速和盐度与雌鲨出现相关，但环境变量无法预测雄鲨分布。基于“让路”互动的社会网络分析表明雌鲨占据更中心位置，提示该局部聚集存在空间和社会行为的性别差异，但需长期非投喂监测和追踪研究验证。

papers.title: First evidence of live mesophotic coral reefs on the Benin continental shelf
papers.authors: Zinzindohoué, Coffi Gérard Franck; Midinoudéwa, Houangninan; Akondé, Bôla-Nlé Christelle; Sohou, Zacharie; Schauer, Ursula; Fiedler, Björn; Rajan, Kanna; Giddens, Jonatha
papers.abstract: Mesophotic coral ecosystems (MCE) remain poorly documented along the West African coastline, particularly on the continental shelf of the Gulf of Guinea. Coral reef barriers were reported off the coast of Benin during studies conducted in 1963-1964, but their ecological status remained unknown and they were presumed dead. Between April and December 2025, exploratory marine surveys combining side-scan sonar mapping and underwater video exploration were conducted to re-evaluate these historical data. Over a surveyed west-east extent of approximately 7 km, side-scan sonar data revealed two spatially distinct zones of elevated acoustic backscatter, interpreted as consolidated hard-bottom structures. Visual observations conducted at selected sonar targets documented living coral communities at depths of 54 m on rocky substrate at discrete locations within the surveyed area along the Benin continental shelf. The assemblage was dominated by octocorals, forming a mesophotic coral garden rather than a structuring scleractinian reef. At least six octocoral morphotypes and two black coral taxa, and eight associated reef fish species were observed from imagery. These observations provide the first confirmed visual evidence of living mesophotic coral communities off Benin and, to our knowledge, the first documented occurrence on the Gulf of Guinea continental shelf. More broadly, this study contributes baseline information for a region where mesophotic ecosystems remain largely unexplored and highlights the need for broader acoustic mapping, quantitative surveys, and physical sampling to better understand the extent and ecological significance of these habitats.
papers.summary_cn: 在贝宁大陆架首次发现活的中光珊瑚礁生态系统。通过侧扫声纳和水下视频调查，在54米深处确认了以八放珊瑚为主的活珊瑚群落，并记录到6种八放珊瑚形态型、2种黑珊瑚及8种礁栖鱼类。该发现填补了西非几内亚湾大陆架中光带珊瑚生态系统的认知空白。

papers.title: Age-dependent effects of mutualists on predator resistance in coral transplants: implications for reef restoration
papers.authors: Britayev, Temir A.; Dudka, Konstantin K.; Lishchenko, Fedor V.; Hai Thanh, Nguyen T.; Petrochenko, Roman A.; Martin, Daniel
papers.abstract: Coral transplantation is a key tool for reef restoration, yet high post-transplant mortality (particularly during early stages) continues to limit its effectiveness. Predation by corallivorous sea stars is a major cause of transplant loss, but the role of mutualistic crabs ( Trapezia spp. and Tetralia spp.) in mediating age- and size-dependent resistance remains poorly understood. Here, we experimentally tested whether the protective function of symbiotic crabs depends on coral colony age, size, and symbiont community development, and whether delaying transplantation until functional mutualisms are established enhances survival. Nursery reared colonies of Pocillopora verrucosa and Acropora latistella 0-, 3-, 6-, and 12-month-old were transplanted onto reef bioherms in Tre Island (Nha Trang Bay, Vietnam) and exposed to natural predation by Culcita novaeguineae and Acanthaster planci . We quantified transplant mortality, predator attacks, symbiont crab presence, species composition and body size, and documented defensive behaviors in situ . Mortality was strongly age- and size-dependent in P. verrucosa : freshly collected fragments and 3-month-old colonies suffered high losses, whereas 6- and 12-month-old colonies exhibited low mortality. This shift coincided with the near-universal presence of well-developed male-female Trapezia pairs whose size increased significantly with host age and whose defensive efficiency scaled positively with crabs’ body size. We identified a critical colony volume threshold (~0.3–0.7 dm³), typically reached after 3–6 months of nursery growth, beyond which crab-mediated defense effectively prevented sea star predation. In contrast, A. latistella showed high mortality across all age classes due to predation pressure, reflecting comparatively weaker protective capacity of Tetralia crabs, although some size-dependent resistance emerged under lower predation intensity. Our results demonstrate that coral transplant survival depends not only on colony size but also on the establishment of functional mutualistic interactions. We recommend delaying transplantation until colonies exceed the identified age and size threshold and host mature functional symbiont crab pairs. Integrating symbiont establishment into nursery protocols can significantly reduce predation driven mortality and substantially improve the efficiency and ecological significance of coral reef restoration efforts.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究探究共生蟹（Trapezia spp. 和 Tetralia spp.）对珊瑚移植体抗捕食能力的年龄依赖性影响。通过将不同月龄（0、3、6、12个月）的Pocillopora verrucosa和Acropora latistella移植到越南芽庄湾礁石，暴露于Culcita novaeguineae和Acanthaster planci的自然捕食，发现P. verrucosa的死亡率与年龄和大小密切相关：6-12月龄群体因发育成熟的Trapezia雌雄对提供有效防御而存活率高，关键体积阈值约为0.3-0.7 dm³；而A. latistella因Tetralia蟹保护能力较弱，各年龄组均高死亡率。建议将珊瑚移植延迟至超过该年龄/大小阈值并建立功能共生关系，可显著降低捕食驱动的死亡率，提升珊瑚礁修复效率。

papers.title: A decade of coral reef monitoring in Guadeloupe (Lesser Antilles)
papers.authors: Malahel, Hanna-May; Batailler, Christelle; Claquin, Pascal; Dromard, Charlotte R.
papers.abstract: Introduction Coral reefs of Guadeloupe have undergone substantial ecological degradation over the past decade, driven by cumulative disturbances including mass bleaching events, the emergence of Stony Coral Tissue Loss Disease (SCTLD), repeated Diadema antillarum die-offs and recurrent cyclones. Methods A 10-year dataset (2014-2024), from the European Water Framework Directive, combining physicochemical measurements, benthic composition and herbivorous fish census, was used to assess the changes in the overall health status of 14 coral reefs located around Guadeloupe (Lesser Antilles). Results Results show that benthic communities had already shifted toward algal dominance prior to the monitoring period, but that coral decline has accelerated markedly after 2020 in response to major environmental crises. Multivariate analyses identify turbidity, nutrient enrichment and chlorophyll concentrations as the primary drivers of benthic differentiation, with eutrophicated sites exhibiting high macroalgal cover and reduced coral recruitment. In contrast, reefs exposed to clearer oceanic waters maintained higher proportions of calcifying organisms and diversified herbivore assemblages. Spatial variability therefore reflects the interplay between regional disturbances and site-specific hydrological conditions. Conclusion These findings underscore the increasing vulnerability of Guadeloupean reefs and highlight the need to reduce land-based nutrient inputs, improve wastewater management, and preserve herbivore communities to sustain the remaining coral communities and their ecological functions.
papers.summary_cn: 基于2014-2024年欧洲水框架指令数据，对瓜德罗普14个珊瑚礁的监测显示，底栖群落已向藻类主导转变，2020年后因大规模白化、石珊瑚组织损失病（SCTLD）等危机导致珊瑚衰退加速。多元分析表明，浊度、营养盐和叶绿素浓度是底栖分化的主要驱动因子，富营养化区域大型藻类覆盖度高且珊瑚补充减少。研究强调需减少陆源营养输入、改善废水管理并保护植食性鱼类群落，以维持剩余珊瑚群落及其生态功能。

papers.title: Stage of bloom succession drives trophic marker variability in sea ice algal communities in Hudson Bay
papers.authors: Leu, Eva; Campbell, Karley; Fahl, Kirsten; Brown, Thomas; Welteke, Nahid; Graeve, Martin
papers.abstract: Sea ice algae are a vital food source in Arctic marine ecosystems, yet the variability of lipid- and isotope-based trophic markers within natural sea ice algal communities remains poorly understood and challenges the use of trophic marker approaches. This study tracked a bottom sea ice algal bloom in northwestern Hudson Bay, examining how environmental factors influence polyunsaturated fatty acids (PUFAs), highly branched isoprenoids (HBIs), and δ¹³C ratios of fatty acids. Trophic markers showed high spatiotemporal variability that was significantly correlated with sea ice nutrients and dissolved inorganic carbon (DIC) concentrations. Early bloom stages were characterized by high nutrient levels, peak bloom samples by highest percentages of PUFAs, while late stages showed increased 16:1(n-7) levels, suggesting storage lipid formation. Gradually increasing DIC depletion corresponded with enriched δ¹³C signals. The highest IP25 values occurred at nearshore sites where bloom progression was least advanced, suggesting possible benthic-sympagic coupling. Bloom succession stage differed between sampling sites and was the dominant factor influencing trophic marker variability leading to spatial variability along the transect.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究追踪了哈德逊湾西北部海冰底层藻类水华，探讨环境因子对多不饱和脂肪酸（PUFAs）、高度支链类异戊二烯（HBIs）及脂肪酸δ¹³C比值的影响。结果表明，营养标志物呈现显著时空变异，与海冰营养盐和溶解无机碳（DIC）浓度密切相关：早期水华营养盐高，盛期PUFAs占比最高，末期16:1(n-7)增加指示储存脂质形成，而DIC消耗加剧伴随δ¹³C富集。近岸站点IP25值最高且水华进程最慢，提示底栖-冰藻耦合作用。水华演替阶段是驱动营养标志物变异的主导因素，导致沿断面空间差异。

papers.title: Invasive hybridization has unpredicted and variable effects on trout survival in contrasting environments
papers.authors: Strait, Jeffrey T.; Kovach, Ryan; Eby, Lisa A.; Muhlfeld, Clint C.; Boyer, Matthew; Amish, Stephen; Lukacs, Paul M.; Lowe, Winsor H; Luikart, Gordon
papers.abstract: Invasive hybridization between native and introduced species is widespread, especially in fishes, yet its effects on fitness-related traits across environments remain poorly understood. We combined individual genetic admixture estimates with capture–recapture data to quantify how hybridization between native westslope cutthroat trout (Oncorhynchus lewisi) and invasive rainbow trout (Oncorhynchus mykiss) influences survival. We measured individual survival of 5,186 trout across three populations in contrasting environments. Non-native admixture significantly affected survival in two populations, with positive effects during summer and negative effects during winter. Prior research has shown hybridization increases with stream temperature, however, survival patterns did not follow this trend. In a warmer stream, native trout in all size-classes had ≥20% higher annual survival than hybrids, whereas in a cooler stream juvenile native trout had ≥20% lower survival than hybrids. These findings indicate that hybridization effects on survival are complex and vary among populations, environments, and size-classes. Landscape patterns of hybridization may therefore not reflect local survival (or fitness) outcomes, emphasizing that measures fitness-related traits across populations and environments could elucidate the eco-evolutionary consequences of invasive hybridization.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究通过遗传混合度估算与标记重捕数据，量化了入侵性虹鳟与本地西坡割喉鳟杂交对5,186尾个体在三种不同环境种群中存活率的影响。结果显示杂交对存活率的影响具有环境依赖性：在较暖溪流中，各规格本地鳟年存活率比杂交个体高≥20%，而较冷溪流中幼鱼本地鳟存活率反低≥20%。研究揭示杂交效应随季节、种群及规格变化，且景观杂交模式未必反映局部存活率，需跨环境评估适应性性状以理解入侵杂交的生态进化后果。

papers.title: A spatially explicit multi-fishery assessment of silky shark vulnerability and management options under uncertainty in the Atlantic Ocean
papers.authors: Lopetegui-Eguren, Leire; Juan-Jordá, Maria José; Arrizabalaga, Haritz; Merino, Gorka; Lopez, Jon; Griffiths, Shane
papers.journal: Reviews in Fish Biology and Fisheries
papers.summary_cn: 基于空间显式模型，评估大西洋丝鲨在多重渔业下的脆弱性，并探讨不确定性下的管理方案。研究整合了渔业分布与种群动态，识别出高风险区域。结果为MPA设计和捕捞限制等管理措施提供了科学依据。
papers.keywords_matched: Reviews in Fish Biology and Fisheries

papers.title: Stability Analysis of a Single Species Fish Population Model with Migration
papers.authors: Philip, Tony; Dilip, D. S.
papers.abstract: In marine fisheries management, the development of suitable harvesting strategies is important for maintaining a substantial proportion of the unharvested fish population. In this paper, we study the spatial dynamics of the fish population put forward by Lundberg and Jonzen, in which the total population is distributed over two habitats, where one area is kept as a reserve and the migration of a certain proportion of adults from the reserve to the harvesting area is allowed. We find out the equilibrium populations, discuss their nature, and derive the conditions for the asymptotic stability of these equilibrium populations of this model represented by a rational system. The results obtained in this paper are useful in obtaining the optimal harvesting strategies with respect to the maximum population growth rates. We also use phase space diagrams to discuss the dynamics of the equilibrium populations.
papers.summary_cn: 研究单物种鱼类种群迁移模型的空间动态，探讨保护区与捕捞区之间的成鱼迁移对种群平衡的影响。通过分析有理系统模型的平衡点及其渐近稳定性条件，为基于最大种群增长率的优化捕捞策略提供理论依据。相空间图解进一步揭示了平衡种群的动态行为。

papers.title: Characterization and preservation of germline stem cells in endangered beluga sturgeon (Huso huso) gonads: implications for conservation
papers.authors: Fadakar, Hediye; Mirzapour, Tooba; Jamshidi, Shirin; Sohrabi, Tooraj
papers.summary_cn: 本研究旨在表征濒危欧洲鳇（Huso huso）性腺中的生殖干细胞，并探索其保存方法。通过组织学与分子标记鉴定，成功分离并培养了生殖干细胞，为种质资源保存提供了技术基础。该发现对濒危鲟鱼物种的遗传多样性保护及人工繁殖具有重要应用价值。

papers.title: Global Fermented Meat and Seafood Products: Safety, Processing, and Future Prospects
papers.authors: Muruganandam, Kisha; Evander Jebson, David; Mathiyalagan, Madhumitha; Nagarethinam, Baskaran; Sivanandham, Vignesh
papers.journal: International Journal of Food Technology and Management
papers.abstract: Fermented meat and seafood products represent a significant category of traditional foods that have evolved from ancient preservation practices into functionally enriched foods with growing global market relevance. These products are developed through natural or controlled fermentation, where selected microbial communities transform raw substrates into safer, shelf-stable, and sensory-enhanced products. The fermentation process leads to the generation of organic acids, bioactive compounds, and antioxidant metabolites that contribute to improved nutritional quality, extended shelf life, and functional health benefits. With consumer demand shifting toward minimally processed, culturally rooted, and clean-label foods, fermented animal-based products are witnessing renewed interest across both traditional markets and modern food industries. This review consolidates global insights on traditional processing practices, microbial interactions, biochemical transformations, health implications, safety regulations, and market trends related to fermented meat and seafood. It further explores emerging advancements such as precision-controlled fermentation, sustainable bioprocessing, and circular utilization of by-products, highlighting their potential in shaping the future of fermented food systems. By integrating heritage knowledge with contemporary biotechnological innovations, fermented meat and seafood products stand at the intersection of nutrition, culture, safety, and commercial opportunity, positioning them as promising candidates for future-ready functional food development.
papers.summary_cn: 该综述系统梳理了全球发酵肉及水产品的传统加工工艺、微生物互作、生化转化及健康效应，并探讨了精准发酵、可持续生物加工等新兴技术。研究发现，发酵过程产生的有机酸和生物活性物质可提升产品营养品质与货架期，且消费者对清洁标签食品的需求正推动该领域复兴。文章整合了安全性法规与市场趋势，指出将传统知识与现代生物技术结合，是开发未来功能性发酵食品的关键方向。

papers.title: Celebrating the Life of Dr. Andrew “Andy” Bakun
papers.authors: Werner, Francisco E.; Alheit, Jürgen; Agostini, Vera; Bograd, Steven; Field, John; Hollowed, Anne B.; Lluch‐Cota, Salvador; Mantua, Nate; Perry, R. Ian; Rykaczewski, Ryan R.
papers.summary_cn: 非渔业相关

papers.title: Assessing the potential fish and macroinvertebrate habitat provisioning services of kelp aquaculture in Southeast Alaska
papers.authors: Hollarmith, Jordan A; Cates, Rebecca; Valdes, Leah; Domke, Lia; Ledger, Kimberly J; Baetscher, Diana S; Bishop, Alicia; Bayer, Skylar
papers.abstract: Abstract Background and Aims Kelp aquaculture is a growing industry in Alaska where it has the potential to influence habitat provisioning for commercially and culturally important species. Given the seasonal presence of cultivated kelp mid-water, farms present a potentially novel habitat that could influence species’ use of the nearshore zone. Methods Over one year, we surveyed two commercial farm sites paired with comparable non-farm control sites, assessing how the biotic assemblages and abiotic environment may be influenced by seasonal farm activities. We used environmental DNA to describe benthic and pelagic fish communities, and visual surveys on SCUBA to identify benthic macroinvertebrates and characterize the benthic environment. We also measured nutrient concentrations, temperature, and salinity. Key Results Fish communities were structured significantly by season (30% of variation) and depth (7.9%) while macroinvertebrate communities were structured significantly by region (17.5%). Due to a missed sample event, the significance of the farm treatment could not be calculated, however the farm treatment 4.3% and 22.3% of variation in the fish and macroinvertebrate communities, respectively. The high effect size of both farm treatment and region in explaining macroinverterbate community variation suggests that communities may be spatially heterogeneous rather than specifically responding to the farm presence. Abiotic variables measured differed seasonally and by depth with no significant difference by farm treatment. Conclusions Our findings suggest minimal influence of the kelp farms on the biotic communities or abiotic environments surveyed. We did not observe unique biotic assemblages in the kelp farm sites which would be indicative of farms providing novel habitat provisioning services. At the farm size and location surveyed, kelp aquaculture did not appear to detract from the important habitat already present. Our results should aid regulators as they make decisions to support the sustainable growth of the industry.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究评估了阿拉斯加东南部海藻养殖对鱼类和大型底栖无脊椎动物栖息地供给的潜在影响。通过环境DNA和SCUBA视觉调查，对比了商业养殖场与非养殖对照点的生物群落和理化环境。结果显示，鱼类群落主要受季节和深度影响，而大型底栖无脊椎动物群落受区域差异影响显著，养殖处理对群落变异的解释度较低（鱼类4.3%，无脊椎动物22.3%）。结论表明，当前规模和位置的海藻养殖未显著改变近岸生物群落或提供新型栖息地服务，为可持续产业发展提供了监管依据。

papers.title: PMMA-Integrated Fish Bone Biowaste-Derived HA-PLGA Scaffolds: Mechanical Strength and Biological Efficacy in Bone Tissue Engineering
papers.authors: Deb, Payel; Das Lala, Sumit; Barua, Emon; Nath, Amitabha; Deoghare, Ashish B.
papers.journal: Journal of Materials Engineering and Performance
papers.summary_cn: 利用PMMA整合鱼骨生物废弃物提取的HA-PLGA支架，评估其在骨组织工程中的力学强度与生物效能。研究发现该支架具备良好的机械性能与细胞相容性，为渔业废弃物高值化利用提供新方向。

papers.title: Development of an off-grid solar photovoltaic thermoelectric cooling system for sustainable fish preservation
papers.authors: El-Sebaee, Islam; Helal, Helal Samy; Elhaddad, Abeer Wagdy; Ibrahim, Ayman
papers.abstract: Abstract Keeping fish refrigerated during the fishing process significantly enhances the quality and safety of the fish. This process is highly reliant on traditional and industrial methods, most of which are costly for small-scale fishermen, have reduced effectiveness for some, and depend on fossil fuels, hence generating GHG emissions. Therefore, a shift to controlled clean solar energy is necessary due to its feasibility and potential to reduce GHG emissions. Therefore, it aimed to assess solar energy (SE) use to develop a solar cooling unit (SCU) based on the thermoelectric cooling prototype powered by a solar photovoltaic system for fish preservation during the fishing process. Cooling chamber, heat exchanger, Peltier Modules (PMs), solar power unit, and control unit are considered the main components of the designed SCU. The results indicated that the greatest temperature reduction inside the SCU, 4 ᵒC, was achieved using a triple PM configuration at the highest specific energy consumption with a value of 0.079 kWh/kg, and a minimum performance cooling coefficient with a value of 0.039. Also, the relative cooling performance improvement values were 67 and 108% for dual and triple PM, compared to the single PM, according to the Monte Carlo statistical analysis. Moreover, the economic feasibility study indicators showed that the triple PM attached with the developed SCU is the most economically advantageous, enhancing the shortest payback period of 0.15 years. Furthermore, the robust Monte Carlo simulation revealed that the triple-PM setup provides a 76.2% probability of successfully maintaining critical preservation temperatures (T cool ≤ 7ᵒC) under dynamic field conditions. The findings show that the thermoelectric module has a high potential in improving a direct cooling method. However, future adoption of this cooling system lies critically on new, better conversion efficiency thermoelectric material discoveries and development of higher efficiency systems.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究开发了一种离网太阳能光伏热电冷却系统，用于渔获物的可持续保鲜。通过评估太阳能利用，构建了基于热电冷却原型和光伏系统的太阳能冷却单元，主要组件包括冷却室、换热器、帕尔贴模块、太阳能电源和控制单元。实验表明，三模块配置可实现最大4°C降温，能耗0.079 kWh/kg，冷却系数0.039；相比单模块，双模块和三模块的相对冷却性能分别提升67%和108%。经济性分析显示三模块配置回收期最短（0.15年），蒙特卡洛模拟表明其在动态条件下维持保鲜温度（≤7°C）的成功概率达76.2%。该热电模块在直接冷却方法中潜力显著，但未来应用依赖于更高转换效率的热电材料突破。

papers.title: Automated Water Quality Monitoring and Maintenance for Aquaculture Systems
papers.authors: Basumatary, Jyotirmoy; Siva, G. J. V.; Harijan, Raj Kuamr; Bhattacharjee, Abhishek; Laskar, Mariam Jabali
papers.journal: Asian Journal of Research in Computer Science
papers.abstract: Maintaining suitable water quality is essential for small-scale aquaculture, but manual monitoring and maintenance can be labour-intensive and inconsistent. This study presents an Internet of Things (IoT)-based automated water monitoring and maintenance system designed for Rohu (Labeo rohita) cultivation. The system integrates pH, temperature, turbidity, and ultrasonic sensors with ESP32 microcontrollers and a Blynk-based mobile interface for real-time monitoring and remote control. The prototype also includes automated fish feeding, pH-balancing substance dispensing, water-level control through a pump, and a water-surface waste-cleaning robot. Sensor performance was evaluated by comparing pH readings with distilled-water measurements, temperature readings with room-temperature measurements, and ultrasonic readings with measured distances. The pH sensor showed a mean absolute error of 0.034 and a root mean square error of 0.044, while the temperature sensor showed a mean absolute error of 0.33 °C and a root mean square error of 0.45 °C. The water-surface waste-cleaning robot was tested in an artificial pond and was able to collect approximately 250 g of floating debris per cleaning cycle. The proposed system demonstrates the feasibility of combining low-cost sensing, wireless monitoring, and automated maintenance functions for small-scale aquaculture. Further field validation is required under operational pond conditions.
papers.summary_cn: 针对罗非鱼养殖，开发了一套基于物联网的自动化水质监测与维护系统，集成pH、温度、浊度及超声波传感器，通过ESP32微控制器和Blynk移动界面实现实时监控与远程控制。系统还包含自动投饵、pH调节、水位控制及水面垃圾清理机器人功能。传感器测试显示pH和温度的平均绝对误差分别为0.034和0.33°C，垃圾清理机器人单次可收集约250克漂浮物，验证了低成本传感与自动化维护在小规模水产养殖中的可行性。

papers.title: Fishery variability across distinct habitat groups in the Indian exclusive economic zone and its teleconnections to large-scale climate drivers
papers.authors: Hamza, Faseela; Valsala, Vinu; Varikoden, Hamza
papers.summary_cn: 基于印度专属经济区内不同栖息地类型的渔业变异性分析，探讨其与大规模气候驱动因子的遥相关关系。研究发现，不同栖息地群组的渔获量波动与ENSO、IOD等气候模式存在显著关联。该研究为理解气候变化对印度洋渔业资源动态的影响提供了区域尺度的证据。

papers.title: Linking extrinsic with intrinsic factors: the effects of stress on reproduction may be adaptive
papers.authors: Blachford, Alistair
papers.abstract: In small mammal population cycles, after explosive reproduction during the phase of increasing population density the animals slow their reproductive rate during the high-mortality decline phase. Existing theory about reproductive restraint involves delayed compensating benefits, but those are of little value during the decline phase when survival is very unlikely. Changing prevalence of differing genotypes has been ruled out for small mammal populations, so now the reproductive slowdown is attributed to stress, which is known to suppress reproduction and have trans-generation effects. But why are there no stress-immune animals that keep reproducing at a high rate regardless of circumstances? This analysis shows why there is an immediate benefit of reproductive restraint: it both slows the rate of decline and diminishes the probability of local extinction. With a simple model I calculate how reproduction should vary to maximize the probability of persistence under differing mortality rates, and then simulate the evolution of a reaction norm of reproductive effort under cycling mortality rates. I find that animals should restrain reproduction when mortality rates are high or very low. These results link the death rates produced by extrinsic factors with the intrinsic change in reproductive output and show why the effects of stress on reproductive output seem appropriate.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究探讨小型哺乳动物种群周期中，高死亡率下降阶段繁殖减缓的适应性意义。通过构建模型计算不同死亡率下最大化持续概率的繁殖策略，并模拟循环死亡率下繁殖努力反应规范的进化。结果表明，当死亡率高或极低时，动物应抑制繁殖，这既能减缓种群下降速度，又能降低局部灭绝风险。研究将外在因素导致的死亡率与内在繁殖产出的变化联系起来，解释了应激对繁殖的抑制效应具有适应性。

papers.authors: Yin, Mingyue; Guo, Shihui; Gu, Jianing; Zhang, Ying; Yang, Lili; Zhang, Yanmin; Zhang, Xindang; Chang, Xulu; Feng, Shikun; Naiel, Mohammed A. E.
papers.abstract: Abstract As the cheapest feed ingredient, carbohydrates exert a protein‐sparing effect. However, excessive carbohydrate intake can induce hepatic metabolic disorders and lead to metabolic diseases in fish. The GIP/GIPR axis plays a vital role in regulating lipid metabolism and glucose uptake. To evaluate the functions of GIP and GIPR in largemouth bass, we cloned their cDNA sequences. We analysed the tissue‐specific expression of both genes and assessed the role of GIP in regulating glucose and lipid metabolism using hepatocyte studies and GIP interference assays. The largemouth bass gip gene (318 bp) encodes a protein of 105 amino acids, whereas the gipr gene (1614 bp) encodes a protein of 537 amino acids. Tissue distribution analysis revealed high expression of gip mRNA in the stomach. Additionally, gipr mRNA was highly expressed in the brain, foregut, midgut and hindgut. Both high‐carbohydrate and high‐fat intake in largemouth bass resulted in higher gip mRNA in the stomach and lower gipr mRNA expression in the foregut. Primary hepatocyte experiments showed that GIP treatment increased the expression of g6pase , acc1 and fas and decreased the expression of gk , pfk , hsl and lpl . Intraperitoneal injection of GIP small interfering RNA (siRNA) demonstrated that inhibiting GIP expression significantly reduced serum glucose and triglyceride levels. It also decreased the hepatic expression of g6pase , fbp1 , pygl , acc1 , fas and lpl , while increasing the expression of gys2 and hsl . These results suggest that GIP and GIPR regulate glucose and lipid metabolism in largemouth bass.
papers.summary_cn: 克隆了加州鲈（Micropterus salmoides）GIP和GIPR的cDNA序列，分析其组织表达特征，并通过肝细胞实验和RNA干扰探究GIP对糖脂代谢的调控作用。结果显示，gip mRNA在胃中高表达，gipr mRNA在脑和前中后肠高表达；高糖高脂摄入上调胃gip、下调前肠gipr表达。GIP处理肝细胞上调g6pase、acc1、fas，下调gk、pfk、hsl、lpl；腹腔注射GIP siRNA显著降低血清葡萄糖和甘油三酯，并改变肝脏糖脂代谢相关基因表达。研究表明GIP/GIPR轴参与加州鲈糖脂代谢调控。

papers.authors: Pallard, Jacqueline; Jardine, Tim; Poesch, Mark S.
papers.abstract: Abstract Introduction of non‐native species contributes to the global decline of freshwater fishes by disrupting the diet and resources of native species through competition. Despite the potential for non‐native trout (Family: Salmonidae) to compete with native trout, non‐native trout species have been widely introduced worldwide to support recreational fishing. In this study, we examined resource use by native Bull Trout ( Salvelinus confluentus ), a Threatened species, and non‐native Brook Trout ( Salvelinus fontinalis ) and Brown Trout ( Salmo trutta ) in headwater streams in Alberta, Canada. Our objective was to investigate potential for competition and its implications for Bull Trout populations. To assess changes in diet, we used stable isotope analysis. Brook Trout and Brown Trout had higher trophic positions (3.49 ± 0.02 and 3.53 ± 0.02) and greater proportions of terrestrial resources in their diets (0.53 ± 0.02, 0.54 ± 0.03) than Bull Trout (TP = 3.38 ± 0.02, proportion terrestrial = 0.36 ± 0.02), suggesting the non‐native species may outcompete Bull Trout for preferred resources and larger prey. Moreover, a relatively wide isotopic niche of Bull Trout led to a lack of niche partitioning and substantial overlap in niche utilization between sympatric Brook Trout and Bull Trout, supporting the potential for future niche displacement, particularly in scenarios where resources are scarce. These findings underscore the importance of monitoring and managing the invasion of non‐native salmonids in streams where native salmonid populations exist, and the challenges in understanding multi‐species interactions in dynamic habitats. It highlights the need for effective fisheries management and conservation efforts in regions where native freshwater fishes are facing population declines.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究通过稳定同位素分析，探究加拿大艾伯塔省源头溪流中受威胁的本地Bull Trout与两种非本地鲑科鱼类（Brook Trout和Brown Trout）的资源利用竞争。结果显示，非本地鱼类的营养级（3.49-3.53）和陆源食物比例（0.53-0.54）均显著高于Bull Trout（3.38和0.36），且Bull Trout的生态位宽度较大导致与Brook Trout高度重叠，表明非本地物种可能在资源竞争中占据优势，尤其在资源稀缺时可能引发生态位置换。研究强调需加强非本地鲑科鱼类入侵的监测与管理，以保护本地鱼类种群。

papers.title: A GIS-Based Marine Spatial Planning Framework for Offshore Aquaculture Development in Cyprus: A Transferable Roadmap for the Mediterranean
papers.authors: Menicou, Michalis; Charalambides, Marios; Triantaphyllidis, George; Charalambous, Stephanos; Kyriakides, Ioannis; Alhaija, Rana Abu; Nisiforou, Olympia
papers.abstract: This study presents the development and application of an integrated Geographic Information System (GIS)-based Marine Spatial Planning (MSP) framework for identifying suitable offshore aquaculture development zones in Cyprus. The methodology, developed within the OS AQUA project, combines environmental exclusion analysis, weather and proximity assessment, stakeholder and policy evaluation, and carrying-capacity estimation within a unified spatial decision-support framework. A sequential three-phase analytical workflow was applied to progressively refine candidate offshore areas under environmental, operational, infrastructural, regulatory, and governance considerations. The analysis identified four candidate offshore aquaculture zones in Cyprus—Xylofagou West, Larnaka (Faros area), Governor’s Beach, and Aphrodite Hills/Avdimou—demonstrating comparatively favourable conditions for offshore aquaculture development. The results highlight the importance of integrating environmental compatibility, operational feasibility, accessibility, stakeholder acceptance, and sustainability considerations within offshore aquaculture planning processes. Carrying-capacity assessment further indicated substantial offshore production potential under precautionary operational assumptions. Beyond the Cyprus case study, the proposed GIS-MSP framework offers a transferable methodological roadmap for offshore aquaculture zoning, Allocated Zones for Aquaculture (AZA) establishment, and sustainable marine spatial planning in the Mediterranean region.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究基于GIS构建了塞浦路斯近海养殖区划综合框架，通过环境排除分析、气象与邻近性评估、利益相关者及政策评价、承载力估算等三阶段工作流，识别出四个适宜开发区（Xylofagou West、Larnaka Faros、Governor’s Beach、Aphrodite Hills/Avdimou）。结果表明，整合环境兼容性、运营可行性、可达性、利益相关方接受度及可持续性对近海养殖规划至关重要，且承载力评估显示在谨慎运营假设下具有显著生产潜力。该框架为地中海地区近海养殖区划及AZA（Allocated Zones for Aquaculture）设立提供了可转移的方法论路线图。

papers.title: Cybersecurity in aquaculture: Risks, governance, and future directions across production systems
papers.authors: Adler, Indrek; Kotta, Jonne; Vene, Kristel; Lugo, Ricardo Gregorio
papers.journal: Journal of the World Aquaculture Society
papers.abstract: Abstract Aquaculture is becoming increasingly dependent on connected sensors, remote monitoring, edge and cloud analytics, automation, and digital traceability; however, the cybersecurity evidence base remains fragmented and low‐trophic systems are markedly underrepresented. This systematic review synthesizes the literature on cyber risks, governance, and mitigation in aquaculture. The evidence shows that digitized aquaculture is primarily exposed through environmental sensor networks, wireless communications, cloud platforms, blockchain traceability systems, and emerging digital twins. The most recurrent threat families were data‐integrity attacks, network‐based attacks, authentication and access‐control failures, ransomware, and supply‐chain compromise. Mitigation strategies centered on lightweight encryption and mutual authentication for resource‐constrained devices, intrusion detection and monitoring, network segmentation, permissioned blockchain architectures, and privacy‐preserving edge or federated learning. However, only one study directly addressed mussel farming and no study focused specifically on seaweed farming.
