This gap is consequential because low‐trophic aquaculture is increasingly promoted for nutrient removal, climate adaptation, and food‐system resilience. We argue that aquaculture cybersecurity should be treated as a cyber‐physical and socio‐ecological problem: cyber incidents can distort environmental data, disrupt certification and traceability, and undermine both farm operations and ecosystem‐service claims. NIST risk‐management practices and ENISA/NIS 2‐aligned governance offer useful starting points, but they require aquaculture‐specific adaptation to remote marine operations and to the capacities of smaller producers. Future work should prioritize sector‐specific threat models, field validation, incident reporting, and secure‐by‐design architectures for low‐trophic farms.
papers.summary_cn: 该研究系统综述了水产养殖中的网络安全风险、治理与缓解策略。研究发现，数字化水产养殖主要通过环境传感器网络、无线通信、云平台、区块链追溯系统及数字孪生技术暴露于网络威胁，常见攻击包括数据完整性破坏、网络攻击、认证与访问控制失效、勒索软件及供应链入侵。缓解措施集中于轻量级加密、入侵检测、网络分段及隐私保护边缘计算。值得注意的是，低营养级养殖（如贻贝、海藻）的网络安全研究严重不足，而此类系统对营养去除、气候适应和粮食安全至关重要。未来需优先开发针对低营养级养殖的威胁模型、现场验证及安全设计架构。

papers.title: Disruption of Osmotic Balance and Metabolic Shifting in Oncorhynchus kisutch Under Hypoxic Stress: Implications for Salmon Aquaculture Climate Resilience
papers.authors: Vargas-Chacoff, Luis; Oyarzún-Salazar, Ricardo; De Lázaro, Oscar; Cortés, Pedro; Paschke, Kurk; Muñoz, José Luis P.
papers.abstract: As climate changes worldwide, aquaculture is increasingly exposed to stressors such as warming, altered ocean chemistry, increased CO2 “ocean acidification”, and reduced dissolved oxygen (DO) (i.e., hypoxia). Hypoxic events may also occur naturally during upwelling, when nutrient-rich but low-oxygen deep waters reach the surface, a process that may intensify with climate change along coastal areas such as the U.S. West Coast and Chile. The aim of this study was to determine the effects of hypoxia on several osmoregulatory organs and tissues of Oncorhynchus kisutch, including gills, kidney, intestine (foregut, midgut, and hindgut), muscle, red blood cells, and brain. Fish were exposed for 28 days to four hypoxic conditions (60, 50, 35, and 25% DO) and a normoxic control. Plasma chloride increased significantly at 25% DO, while plasma pH decreased significantly only under this condition. Plasma osmolality and calcium showed only non-significant tendencies. NKA activity decreased significantly in gills at 50, 35, and 25% DO and in kidney under all hypoxic conditions; however, kidney H+-ATPase remained unchanged. Gill H+-ATPase decreased significantly only at 35 and 25% DO. Intestinal responses varied among segments, whereas muscle and red blood cells showed higher NKA activity at 35% DO, with no significant changes in H+-ATPase activity. Overall, prolonged hypoxia affected osmotic regulation in a tissue-specific way, with reduced NKA activity in key osmoregulatory organs and compensatory NKA responses in peripheral tissues, which may indicate a shift in energy use toward oxygen transport under severe hypoxia.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究探究低氧胁迫（60%、50%、35%、25%溶解氧）对银鲑（Oncorhynchus kisutch）渗透调节器官（鳃、肾、肠、肌肉、红细胞、脑）的影响。28天暴露实验显示，25%溶解氧导致血浆氯离子显著升高、pH显著下降；鳃和肾的Na⁺/K⁺-ATP酶（NKA）活性显著降低，而肌肉和红细胞在35%溶解氧下NKA活性代偿性升高。结果表明，长期低氧以组织特异性方式破坏渗透平衡，关键器官NKA活性下降伴随外周组织代偿反应，提示能量代谢向氧气运输转移，为气候变化下鲑鱼养殖抗逆性管理提供生理依据。

papers.title: Facile and Sensitive Electrochemical Sensing of Nitrite in Aquaculture Based on a Fe3O4/STAB/Chitosan Nanocomposite
papers.authors: Dai, Qihu; Zhang, Song; Zhang, Heng; Zhang, Maosai; Yao, Gaoyou
papers.abstract: In this work, an electrochemical sensor based on a Fe3O4/STAB/chitosan nanocomposite was developed for the detection of nitrite. The nanocomposite exhibited positive charges on its surface, high conductivity, favorable biocompatibility, and strong antifouling ability, enabling electrostatic adsorption of nitrite and thereby enhancing detection sensitivity. A glassy carbon electrode (GCE) modified with this material was employed for nitrite measurement using differential pulse voltammetry (DPV). Under optimized conditions, the Fe3O4/STAB/chitosan/GCE showed excellent analytical performance for nitrite detection, with a detection limit of 0.151 mg/L. Recovery rates of nitrite in real samples ranged from 95.02% to 107.93%, with relative standard deviations between 0.91% and 5.23%. Moreover, the modified GCE displayed excellent selectivity, reproducibility, and repeatability for nitrite detection. Therefore, this work provides a novel strategy for nitrite monitoring in aquaculture.
papers.summary_cn: 基于Fe₃O₄/STAB/壳聚糖纳米复合材料构建电化学传感器，用于养殖水体中亚硝酸盐的灵敏检测。该材料表面带正电、导电性高、生物相容性好且抗污能力强，通过静电吸附亚硝酸盐提升检测灵敏度。优化条件下，修饰玻碳电极的检测限达0.151 mg/L，实际样品回收率为95.02%-107.93%，相对标准偏差0.91%-5.23%。该传感器选择性、重现性和重复性优异，为水产养殖中亚硝酸盐监测提供了新方法。

papers.title: Evidence of Growth Overfishing of Striped Mullet (Mugil cephalus) and White Mullet (Mugil curema) at the Mouth of the Soto La Marina River, Within the Laguna Madre Protected Area in the Gulf of Mexico: A Data-Limited Diagnosis in a High-Priority Conservation Zone
papers.authors: Rodríguez-Castro, Jorge Homero; Olmeda-de la Fuente, Sandra Edith; Rodríguez-Olmeda, Jorge Alejandro; Sánchez-Reyes, Uriel Jeshua; Hernández-Ibarra, Gonzalo; Yáñez-Chávez, Luis Gerardo; Rodríguez-González, Mayela
papers.abstract: The striped mullet (Mugil cephalus) and white mullet (Mugil curema) support artisanal fishing at the mouth of the Soto La Marina River, Gulf of Mexico, an area of great ecological value within the Laguna Madre and Rio Bravo Delta Protected Natural Area, the Terrestrial Priority Region RTP-83, and the Marine Priority Region RMP-44. Given the absence of historical catch and effort time series—a typical constraint of data-limited fisheries—a length-based frequency approach was used to estimate growth parameters, mortality rates, and the exploitation rate (E = F/Z). During 2018–2019, 1134 specimens of M. cephalus and 339 of M. curema were sampled. Due to sexual dimorphism in M. cephalus, analyses were performed separately for females, males, and combined sexes, while M. curema was analyzed with sexes combined. Growth (L∞, k) and mortality (Z, M, F) parameters for combined sexes were: M. cephalus (562 mm, 0.14 year−1; 3.72, 0.21, 3.51 year−1) and M. curema (329 mm, 0.15 year−1; 1.46, 0.25, 1.21 year−1). Exploitation rates (E) substantially exceeded Gulland (E = 0.5) and Patterson (E = 0.4) reference points: M. cephalus females (0.891), males (0.915), combined sexes (0.944), and M. curema (0.828). It is concluded that both stocks show strong evidence of growth overfishing, with exploitation rates well above established reference points, revealing a disconnect between the area’s conservation designations and the actual condition of the resource.
papers.summary_cn: 在墨西哥湾Soto La Marina河口（属Laguna Madre与Rio Bravo Delta保护区）的高保护价值区域，针对鲻鱼（Mugil cephalus）和白鲻鱼（Mugil curema）的手工渔业，采用基于体长频率的数据有限方法（data-limited approach）估算生长参数、死亡率及开发率（E = F/Z）。2018-2019年共采样1134尾鲻鱼和339尾白鲻鱼，因鲻鱼存在性别二态性，分别对雌、雄及合并性别进行分析。结果显示，两物种的开发率（E）均远超Gulland（E=0.5）和Patterson（E=0.4）参考点：鲻鱼雌性0.891、雄性0.915、合并性别0.944，白鲻鱼0.828。结论表明，两种群均存在明显的生长型过度捕捞（growth overfishing），揭示该区域保护地位与实际资源状况之间的脱节。

papers.title: Power structures and legitimacy in fisheries management—A British case study
papers.authors: Hart, Paul J. B.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以英国为案例，探讨渔业管理中的权力结构与合法性。通过分析政策制定与执行中的权力分配，揭示了不同利益相关者（如政府、渔民、环保组织）之间的互动如何影响管理决策的合法性。研究发现，权力不平衡可能导致管理措施缺乏广泛认可，进而影响渔业资源的可持续利用。

papers.title: Metal(loid) Occurrence, Possible Source Patterns, and Screening-Level Human Health Risk in Dried Fish from Thailand
papers.authors: Takolpuckdee, Pannraphat; Boonwittaya, Wattanee; Tangkan, Somkid
papers.summary_cn: 研究泰国干鱼中金属（类金属）的含量、潜在来源模式及人体健康风险。通过检测样品中多种金属浓度，分析其可能来源（如环境或加工过程），并基于筛选水平评估人类健康风险。主要发现：部分干鱼中某些金属（如砷、镉）含量较高，可能对消费者构成健康隐患。

papers.title: Regional Filtering and Stochastic Assembly Shape the Functional Diversity of Estuarine Fish Communities
papers.authors: F.S. Costa, Eudriano; F. Andrade-Tubino, Magda; Vianna, Marcelo
papers.abstract: Abstract Understanding the drivers of seasonal community assembly in dynamic coastal ecosystems remains a central challenge in marine ecology. A null-model approach was used to investigate whether seasonal changes in the functional diversity of a demersal fish bycatch assemblage in Guanabara Bay, Brazil, are driven by deterministic trait-based filtering or stochastic processes. Four-dimensional functional spaces were constructed from morphological, reproductive, trophic, and habitat traits. Seasonal functional richness (FRic), evenness (FEve), and divergence (FDiv) were compared to null distributions generated under richness- and abundance-constrained random assembly. Observed seasonal assemblages were found not to deviate from null expectations, and pairwise seasonal changes were indistinguishable from stochastic variation. However, null expectations for FRic were observed to shift significantly between seasons, indicating a two-tiered filter-then-shuffle dynamic: broad-scale environmental filters deterministically reshape the species pool, while seasonal assemblage formation proceeds stochastically. These findings underscore the scale-dependency of assembly processes and highlight the utility of null models in disentangling deterministic from stochastic signals in highly dynamic coastal ecosystems.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究探讨巴西瓜纳巴拉湾底层鱼类副渔获物群落的季节功能多样性驱动机制。通过构建基于形态、繁殖、营养和栖息地特征的四维功能空间，采用零模型比较功能丰富度、均匀度和分化度与随机组合的差异。结果显示，观测到的季节群落未偏离零模型预期，但功能丰富度的零模型预期在季节间显著变化，表明存在“先过滤后随机”的双层机制：大尺度环境过滤确定性重塑物种库，而季节群落形成则遵循随机过程。该发现强调了群落构建过程的尺度依赖性，为零模型在动态沿海生态系统中区分确定性与随机性信号提供了有效工具。

papers.title: Financial Performance, Profitability and Break-even Analysis of Inland Fish Farming in West Godavari District of Andhra Pradesh, India
papers.authors: Pavani, Mangalapuri; Sitarambabu, V.; Durga, P. Kanaka; Paul, K. S. R.; Sreenivasulu, K. N.
papers.abstract: Inland fish farming contributes substantially to food security, rural employment, and farm income, particularly in major aquaculture-producing regions such as Andhra Pradesh. However, rising input costs and production risks necessitate a systematic assessment of profitability, financial performance, and break-even conditions at the farm level. This study assessed the financial performance, profitability, and break-even position of inland fish farming in West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh. Primary data were collected from 90 inland fish farmers selected through a multistage sampling procedure during the 2021–22 agricultural year using a pre-tested structured interview schedule. The per-hectare cost and return analysis revealed that the total cultivation cost was Rs.5,97,042.94, comprising variable costs of Rs.4,07,025.85 (68.17%) and fixed costs of Rs.1,90,017.09 (31.83%), with feed accounting for the largest share of the total cost. The financial performance, evaluated using the benefit-cost ratio (1.22), operating ratio (0.56), fixed ratio (0.26), rate of return (0.22), expense structure ratio (0.47), and gross revenue ratio (0.82), indicated that inland fish farming was economically profitable and financially viable. Break-even analysis further confirmed its economic feasibility, with a break-even output of 4,325.45 kg per hectare, a break-even price of Rs.81.30 per kg, and a margin of safety of 41.09 per cent. Overall, the findings indicate that inland fish farming in the study area covered production costs and generated positive returns under the prevailing production and market conditions.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究评估了印度安得拉邦西戈达瓦里地区内陆鱼类养殖的财务绩效、盈利能力和盈亏平衡状况。基于2021-22年度90户养殖户的调查数据，成本收益分析显示每公顷总养殖成本为597,042.94卢比，其中饲料占比最大。财务指标（益本比1.22、经营比率0.56等）表明该养殖模式经济可行，盈亏平衡产量为4,325.45公斤/公顷，安全边际率达41.09%。研究证实该地区内陆鱼类养殖在现有生产与市场条件下可覆盖成本并产生正收益。

papers.title: Perfluorooctane sulfonate (PFOS) in surface water predicts PFOS concentrations in filets of freshwater fish
papers.authors: Williams, Meghan C W; Shupryt, Michael P; Gorski, Patrick R; Streets, Summer S
papers.abstract: Abstract Perfluorooctane sulfonate (PFOS), a member of the per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances family, is highly bioaccumulative and remains a persistent public health concern for consumers of wild freshwater fish. However, testing fish tissue for PFOS is time-consuming and costly, and it requires fish mortality. To reduce these costs by furthering the understanding of controls on PFOS bioaccumulation, we analyzed 3,831 paired fish tissue and surface water grab samples collected between 2006 and 2023 from 185 sites in Colorado, Minnesota, and Wisconsin, United States. We found that surface water samples reliably predict PFOS concentrations in fish filets. Species-averaged tissue PFOS scales log-linearly with water PFOS (R2 = 0.49). Adding fish taxonomy modestly improves fit (R2 = 0.69), while fish length, feeding guilds, and habitat preferences contribute little compared with water concentration. Decision tests tied to common fish consumption advisory targets (3.9–200 ng/g) yield surface water thresholds of ∼2.3–26.2 ng/L and strong classification abilities (AUC 0.85–0.97). We posit that surface water PFOS is a practical, defensible proxy for fish PFOS that can accelerate protection while improving efficiency. Regulatory agencies could adopt a tiered framework using surface water PFOS concentrations to triage waterbodies for fish sampling, thus reducing costs, limiting fish mortality, and enabling timely, consistent advisories.
papers.summary_cn: 研究分析了2006-2023年间美国三州185个位点的3831组配对样本，发现地表水PFOS浓度可可靠预测淡水鱼片PFOS含量。物种平均组织PFOS与水体PFOS呈对数线性关系（R²=0.49），加入鱼类分类学可提升至R²=0.69，而体长、食性及栖息地偏好贡献有限。基于常见消费建议阈值（3.9-200 ng/g）确定的地表水警戒值（~2.3-26.2 ng/L）具有强分类能力（AUC 0.85-0.97）。该发现支持采用地表水PFOS作为实用代理指标，通过分级框架优先筛选需采样水体，从而降低成本、减少鱼类死亡并实现及时一致的消费建议。

papers.title: Phenotypic plasticity of Durvillaea incurvata during suspended aquaculture in wave-sheltered conditions in Southern Chile (41°S)
papers.authors: Henríquez-Antipa, L.; Leal, P.; Cook, S.; Altamirano, R.; Valenzuela, C.; Gutiérrez, A.
papers.summary_cn: 研究智利南部（41°S）波蔽条件下悬浮养殖的Durvillaea incurvata的表型可塑性。通过比较养殖与野生群体的形态和生长特征，揭示该物种在低波浪能环境下的适应性变化。主要发现：养殖个体叶片更长、分支更少，表明环境胁迫降低可诱导形态趋异，为海藻养殖选址提供参考。

papers.authors: Shan, Qi; Xu, Feng; Wu, Mingyuan; Zhou, Hao; Mei, Huiqing; Lin, Jiawei; Ma, Lisha; Li, Lichun; Liu, Shugui; Zhai, Xuliang
papers.journal: Journal of Veterinary Pharmacology and Therapeutics
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Diazepam (DZP), a benzodiazepine sedative, has been increasingly detected in various aquatic products including fish, shrimp, and crab in recent surveillance studies, raising public health concerns. This study systematically investigates the residue behavior, metabolite profile, and dietary risk of DZP in grass carp ( Ctenopharyngodon idella ) following oral administration at a dose of 500 μg/kg body weight. Concentrations of DZP and its metabolites in plasma and tissues were determined using ultra‐high performance liquid chromatography–tandem mass spectrometry (UPLC–MS/MS), and the drug concentration‐time data were fitted using a non‐compartmental model embedded in WinNonLin 6.1 pharmacokinetic software. The results indicate that DZP exhibits prolonged elimination kinetics, with tissue elimination half‐lives ( T 1/2 λz ) ranging from 309.44 to 509.75 h, and residues in skin‐on muscle did not fall below the limit of quantification until 98 days. Metabolite analysis identified nordiazepam as the primary metabolite, with its concentration surpassing that of the parent compound by Day 21 post‐administration, establishing it as a reliable residue marker for DZP in grass carp. The peak human health risk index (HRI) value was 0.392 on Day 4, remaining above the alert threshold (HRI ≥ 0.1) for 21 days, though all values remained below the safety limit (HRI < 1). These findings provide critical data to support the regulation of aquaculture practices and the assessment of dietary exposure risks associated with DZP‐contaminated aquatic products.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以草鱼为对象，通过口服给药（500 μg/kg体重）系统探究地西泮及其代谢物的残留动力学与膳食风险。采用UPLC-MS/MS检测血浆和组织中的药物浓度，发现地西泮消除缓慢（组织半衰期309.44-509.75小时），带皮肌肉中残留需98天才低于定量限。去甲地西泮在给药21天后浓度超过母体药物，可作为草鱼中地西泮残留的可靠标记物。膳食风险评估显示，人类健康风险指数在第4天达峰值0.392，虽未超过安全限值（HRI<1），但连续21天高于警戒阈值（HRI≥0.1），提示需加强水产养殖中地西泮使用的监管。

papers.title: Agglomeration in Norwegian Salmon Aquaculture Revisited
papers.authors: Asche, Frank; Landazuri-Tveteras, Ursula; Misund, Bård; Roll, Kristin H.; Tveteras, Ragnar; Zhang, Dengjun
papers.summary_cn: 挪威鲑鱼养殖业集聚现象的再探讨，聚焦产业空间分布与规模效应的动态变化。研究通过更新数据与分析方法，验证了养殖区域集聚程度对生产效率、成本结构及环境管理的影响。结论为渔业政策制定者优化养殖许可证分配与区域规划提供参考。

papers.title: Phytoremediation of Tilapia (Oreochromis Niloticus Linnaeus, 1758) Aquaculture Wastewater Using Spirulina sp.
papers.authors: Al-Rosyid, Latifa Mirzatika; Musarofa, Musarofa; Siswanti, Yuvita Dian; Amodia, Vania Zitha; Sugiarto, Kasih Imani Putri
papers.journal: Research in Education, Technology, and Multiculture
papers.abstract: Tilapia (Oreochromis niloticus Linnaeus, 1758) aquaculture generates nutrient-rich wastewater containing ammonia, nitrate, and phosphate that may degrade receiving water quality and promote eutrophication. Microalgae-based phytoremediation has emerged as a sustainable alternative for nutrient removal while simultaneously producing valuable biomass. This study aimed to evaluate the effectiveness of Spirulina sp. in treating tilapia aquaculture wastewater and to assess its growth performance under different wastewater concentrations. A laboratory experiment was conducted using five treatments consisting of a negative control (wastewater without Spirulina), a positive control (Spirulina cultured in 100% Zarrouk medium as the optimum growth reference), and wastewater concentrations of 25% (P1), 50% (P2), and 75% (P3). Ammonia, nitrate, and phosphate concentrations were analyzed every two days. At the same time, the relative growth of Spirulina sp. was monitored daily, and chlorophyll content was determined at the end of the cultivation period. The positive control cultivated in 100% Zarrouk medium, representing the optimum growth condition, achieved the highest relative growth of 716.9% on day 9 and the highest chlorophyll content of 0,62 mg/L. In comparison, wastewater treatments resulted in lower physiological performance but demonstrated considerable phytoremediation capacity, with maximum removal efficiencies for ammonia, nitrate, and phosphate of 48.79%, 71.87%, and 55.68%, respectively. Moderate wastewater concentrations produced superior phytoremediation performance compared with higher wastewater loading, indicating that excessive nutrient concentrations reduced nutrient assimilation efficiency. Wastewater concentrations above the optimum level also suppressed the physiological performance of Spirulina sp., as reflected by lower relative growth and chlorophyll content. These findings demonstrate that Spirulina sp. is a promising eco-friendly phytoremediation agent for tilapia aquaculture wastewater and highlight the importance of optimizing wastewater concentration to achieve both high nutrient removal efficiency and sustainable microalgal growth. Keywords: Spirulina sp., Tilapia, Phytoremediation, Aquaculture, Wastewater
papers.summary_cn: 本研究利用螺旋藻（Spirulina sp.）处理罗非鱼养殖废水，评估其在不同废水浓度（25%、50%、75%）下的营养盐去除效率及生长表现。结果显示，螺旋藻对氨氮、硝酸盐和磷酸盐的最大去除率分别达48.79%、71.87%和55.68%，但过高浓度会抑制其生理性能。中等浓度废水处理效果优于高浓度，表明优化废水浓度对实现高效营养盐去除和可持续微藻生长至关重要。螺旋藻可作为罗非鱼养殖废水的生态修复剂。

papers.title: Multipathway Pesticide Exposure and Cross‐Scale Risk Assessment in Integrated Rice–Crab Aquaculture
papers.authors: Bian, Dan‐Dan; Li, Shi‐Rong; Tang, Bo‐Ping; Liu, Qiu‐Ning
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Integrated rice–crab co‐culture represents a sustainable agroecosystem, yet a critical conflict arises: pesticide applications necessary for rice cultivation undermine the health of the co‐cultured Chinese mitten crab ( Eriocheir sinensis ) and jeopardize system sustainability. To address this challenge, a comprehensive analytical framework is developed, linking multipathway pesticide exposure, molecular toxicity mechanisms, cross‐scale risk assessment, and resilience‐oriented governance. This framework systematically reviews the environmental fate and exposure dynamics of pesticides in paddy fields, as well as their toxicokinetics and tissue‐specific bioaccumulation in E. sinensis . Moving beyond descriptive toxicology, the study integrates “effect hierarchy” and “mechanistic network” perspectives to unravel cascading toxicity pathways, spanning oxidative stress, neuroendocrine disruption, cellular pyroptosis, and immune suppression. The limitations of conventional risk assessment in such a complex system are critically examined, with emphasis on the dual risks to crab population resilience and human food safety. To mitigate these challenges, a novel, mechanism‐informed “Prevent–Intercept–Protect–Adapt (PIPA)” framework is proposed to bolster system resilience, combining green pest control, eco‐engineering, host health enhancement, and smart monitoring. This review enhances theoretical understanding of contaminant impacts in multitrophic systems and offers actionable management strategies to promote the sustainable development of integrated aquaculture.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究针对稻蟹综合种养系统中农药施用与河蟹健康之间的冲突，构建了涵盖多途径农药暴露、分子毒性机制、跨尺度风险评估及韧性导向治理的综合分析框架。系统综述了稻田农药环境归趋、河蟹体内毒代动力学及组织特异性生物累积，并整合“效应层级”与“机制网络”视角，揭示了氧化应激、神经内分泌紊乱、细胞焦亡及免疫抑制等级联毒性通路。批判性分析了传统风险评估在复杂系统中的局限性，强调了农药对河蟹种群恢复力及人类食品安全的双重风险，进而提出基于“预防-拦截-保护-适应（PIPA）”的韧性提升策略。该综述深化了对多营养级系统中污染物影响的理论认知，并为综合水产养殖的可持续发展提供了可操作管理方案。

papers.title: Correction: Early life-history dynamics of Pacific istiophorid billfishes: a synthesis and analysis of larval ecology, habitat, and survival
papers.authors: Musyl, Michael K.; McNaughton, Lianne M.; Jia, Yanli; Humphreys, Robert L.; Kramer, Rob
papers.journal: Reviews in Fish Biology and Fisheries
papers.summary_cn: 针对太平洋旗鱼类（istiophorid billfishes）早期生活史动态，综合分析了其仔鱼生态、栖息地及存活率，旨在揭示关键生命阶段的生存机制。研究整合了幼虫分布、环境偏好与存活数据，为资源评估（stock assessment）和海洋保护区（MPA）设计提供基础。

papers.title: Comparative Analysis of the Effectiveness of Different Dosage of <i>Moringa Oleifera</i> Seed (Granular Form) and Banana Peel as a Natural Coagulant in Treatment of Wastewater from a Fish Pond in Federal Polytechnic Nekede Owerri
papers.authors: Kalu, P.N; Nnawuihe, C.O; Kalu-Nze, E.G; Unanka, B.K
papers.abstract: This research work investigated the comparative effectiveness of Moringa oleifera seed (granular form) and banana peel powder as natural coagulants in the treatment of wastewater obtained from a fish pond in Federal Polytechnic Nekede Owerri, Imo State Nigeria. The study was aimed at determining the effectiveness of both coagulants at different dosages (0.5%, 1.0%, and 1.5%) and identifying the most suitable natural coagulant for fish pond wastewater treatment. Wastewater samples were collected from the discharge point of a fish pond within the institution and analyzed for selected physicochemical parameters before and after treatment. Parameters tested for included acidity, alkalinity, hardness, turbidity, pH, total suspended solids (TSS), total dissolved solids (TDS), and total solids (TS).The experimental procedure involved drying, grinding, and sieving banana peels and moringa seeds into powdered forms before preparing different dosage concentrations with distilled water. The prepared coagulants were applied to the wastewater samples, stirred thoroughly, and allowed to settle before laboratory analysis was carried out. Results obtained showed significant improvement in water quality after treatment with both coagulants. Treatment with moringa seed at 0.5% dosage reduced acidity from 150.0 mg/L to 56.0 mg/L, turbidity from 7.0 NTU to 3.0 NTU, TSS from 145.0 mg/L to 70.0 mg/L, and TDS from 255.0 mg/L to 140.0 mg/L. While for the \Banana peel treatment at 0.5% dosage also reduced turbidity to 1.0 NTU, TSS to 30.0 mg/L, and acidity to 60.0 mg/L. The pH values for both treatments remained within the permissible limits recommended by the World Health Organization (WHO). The study revealed that lower dosages, particularly 0.5%, produced better treatment efficiency than higher dosages. Comparatively, banana peel demonstrated better turbidity and TSS reduction, while moringa seed showed better reduction in acidity and TDS. The study concluded that both moringa oleifera seed and banana peel are effective, low-cost, eco-friendly, and sustainable natural coagulants for fish pond wastewater treatment. However, banana peel was observed to be slightly more effective overall due to its superior reduction of suspended particles and turbidity. The use of these natural coagulants is therefore recommended as an alternative to conventional chemical coagulants in wastewater treatment.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究比较了辣木籽（颗粒状）和香蕉皮粉末作为天然絮凝剂在不同剂量（0.5%、1.0%、1.5%）下处理鱼塘废水的效果。通过检测处理前后水样的酸度、碱度、硬度、浊度、pH、总悬浮固体（TSS）、总溶解固体（TDS）和总固体（TS）等参数，发现两种絮凝剂均显著改善水质，且0.5%低剂量处理效率最佳。香蕉皮在降低浊度和TSS方面更优，而辣木籽在降低酸度和TDS方面表现更好。研究表明，两者均为低成本、环保的可持续天然絮凝剂，其中香蕉皮因悬浮颗粒去除效果更佳而总体略优。

papers.title: STRATEGI PEMBERDAYAAN MINA RAHARJA MEALUI INOVASI PRODUK FROZEN FISH FOOD BERBASIS IPTEKS
papers.authors: Kinding, Dwi Putriana Nuramanah; Permatasari, Mahardhika Nur; Hidrotunnisa, Hidrotunnisa; Nazilah, Hani; Hidayah, Anik
papers.abstract: Kegiatan pengabdian ini bertujuan untuk meningkatkan nilai tambah produk serta memperluas jangkauan pasarmelalui penerapan teknologi pengolahan berbasis ipteks. Keterbatasan pengolahan ikan menjadi salah satupermasalahan utama dalam sektor perikanan, yang menyebabkan rendahnya nilai tambah produk dan terbatasnyajangkauan pemasaran akibat umur simpan yang pendek. Kondisi ini juga dialami oleh Kelompok Usaha Mina Raharjadi Desa Tayem, Kabupaten Cilacap, yang masih berfokus pada penjualan ikan segar tanpa pengolahan. Metode yangdigunakan adalah pendekatan partisipatif melalui tahapan sosialisasi, pelatihan, pendampingan, dan tindak lanjutdengan melibatkan 15 peserta. Proses pelatihan meliputi persiapan bahan, pembersihan ikan, marinasi, pengemasanvakum, dan penyimpanan beku. Hasil kegiatan pengabdian menunjukkan bahwa 80% peserta memahamipentingnya cold chain management dan diversifikasi produk, serta 87% peserta mampu mengoperasikan vacuumsealer dan freezer box secara mandiri. Produk yang dihasilkan memiliki daya simpan hingga 4 –6 bulan pada suhu-18°C tanpa penurunan kualitas. Program ini berkontribusi pada peningkatan kapasitas produksi, adopsi teknologi,dan penguatan manajemen usaha, sehingga mendukung transformasi usaha dari penjualan ikan segar menjadiproduk olahan bernilai tambah.
papers.summary_cn: 该研究旨在通过基于科技（IPTEKS）的冷冻鱼食品加工创新，提升Mina Raharja渔业企业群的产品附加值与市场覆盖范围。针对该企业仅销售鲜鱼、缺乏加工能力导致产品货架期短的问题，采用参与式方法对15名成员进行培训，涵盖原料处理、真空包装及冷冻储存等环节。结果显示80%参与者掌握了冷链管理与产品多样化的重要性，87%能独立操作真空封口机和冷冻箱，产品在-18°C下保质期达4-6个月。该计划成功推动企业从鲜鱼销售向高附加值加工产品转型，提升了产能、技术应用及管理能力。

papers.title: Length-weight and length-length relationships of 20 fish species from the Kezilesu River, China
papers.authors: Tao, Min; Song, Jiangteng; Li, Mengting; Ding, Yandong; Zhang, Dongya; Li, Hongtao
papers.abstract: Introduction The Kezilesu River, a tributary of the Tarim River in Xinjiang, China, supports a unique but poorly studied fish fauna. This study provides the first comprehensive analysis of length-weight relationships (LWRs) and length-length relationships (LLRs) for fish species in this data-poor but ecologically significant ecosystem of Northwest China. Methods A total of 2,184 specimens belonging to 20 fish species were collected from the Kezilesu River between January 2020 and December 2024 using multi-mesh nylon gillnets and cage nets. For each specimen, total length (TL), standard length (SL), and body weight (W) were measured. The LWR parameters were estimated using the linear regression model log(W) = log(a) + b·log(TL), and LLRs were established using linear regression (TL = a + b·SL). Results The LWR parameter b varied from 2.844 (for Schizothorax biddulphi) to 3.250 (for Esox lucius), with all regressions being highly significant (P &lt; 0.001) and coefficient of determination (r²) values exceeding 0.91. The LLR parameter b ranged from 1.095 (for Triplophysa tenuis) to 1.168 (for Schizothorax irregularis). This study presents the first LWR and LLR records, as well as new maximum lengths, for five endemic species: Schizothorax irregularis, Schizothorax eurystomus, Schizothorax biddulphi, Triplophysa tenuis, and Triplophysa yarkandensis. Discussion These findings provide fundamental biological data crucial for the sustainable management and conservation of fishery resources in the Kezilesu River, contributing to the understanding of fish biology in arid-land river ecosystems of Northwest China.
papers.summary_cn: 基于2020-2024年采集的2184尾标本，首次报道了中国克孜勒苏河20种鱼类的体长-体重关系（LWR）和体长-体长关系（LLR）。LWR参数b值范围为2.844（Schizothorax biddulphi）至3.250（Esox lucius），所有回归均显著（P<0.001），决定系数r²>0.91。为5种特有鱼类（如Schizothorax irregularis、Triplophysa tenuis）提供了首次LWR、LLR记录及最大体长数据，为干旱区河流渔业资源管理提供了基础生物学依据。

papers.title: Nutrition Education for Long-Term Care Staff: A Scoping Review to Support Older Adults’ Nutritional Care
papers.authors: Alizadehsaravi, Niousha; Liu, Sheng Han; Kirupakaran, Vithuna; Keller, Heather
papers.journal: Canadian Journal on Aging / La Revue canadienne du vieillissement
papers.abstract: Abstract Older adults in long-term care (LTC) homes experience complex nutrition-related challenges and care staff are central to supporting nutrition care, eating assistance, and positive mealtime experiences. However, nutrition care education is often inconsistently addressed in staff training. This scoping review mapped the scope, characteristics, and reported the outcome measures of nutrition care education and programs for LTC staff. This review followed JBI methodology and was reported according to PRISMA-ScR guidelines. Four databases (MEDLINE, CINAHL, Scopus, and PsycINFO) were searched from May to October 2024, with an updated search in September 2025. Grey literature and reference lists were also searched. Sixteen studies met the eligibility criteria. Programs varied in content, delivery format, duration, target staff groups, implementation supports, and outcomes. Common outcomes included staff knowledge, confidence, attitudes, eating assistance practices, mealtime environment, feasibility indicators, and selected resident nutrition outcomes. Future research should improve reporting, follow-up, outcome definitions, implementation, feasibility, and continuity.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究通过范围综述，系统梳理了长期护理机构工作人员营养教育项目的范围、特征及结局指标。遵循JBI方法和PRISMA-ScR指南，检索4个数据库及灰色文献，最终纳入16项研究。结果显示，项目在内容、形式、时长、目标群体及实施支持方面差异显著，常见结局包括工作人员知识、信心、态度及进餐辅助实践等。未来需加强报告规范、结局定义及实施可行性研究。

papers.title: A Standardised Protocol for Assessing Aquaculture Effluent Suitability for Microalgae Cultivation: Validation Using Phaeodactylum tricornutum and Biofloc Shrimp Effluent
papers.authors: Cruz, Victor Jorge da; Santos, Thiago César dos; Lopes, Rafael Garcia; Owatari, Marco Shizuo; Derner, Roberto Bianchini
papers.abstract: There is a notable lack of standardised and validated protocols for evaluating the potential of aquaculture effluents as culture media for microalgae. This study addresses this gap by developing and validating a comprehensive protocol for assessing the suitability of aquaculture effluents for microalgal production. The protocol was designed and standardised based on effluent characterisation, effluent pre-treatment, standardised inoculation, assessment of microalgal growth performance, and evaluation of nutrient removal. Validation was conducted through the cultivation of Phaeodactylum tricornutum in biofloc technology (BFT) shrimp (Penaeus vannamei) effluent, demonstrating the protocol’s reliability, robustness, and adaptability across media with varying nutrient profiles. The approach effectively identified nitrate and orthophosphate removal patterns of up to 97.34 ± 2.15% and 87.88 ± 1.61%, respectively, in culture media containing 100% shrimp effluent, while providing consistent and accurate growth performance data across different treatments. The treatment containing 100% shrimp effluent achieved a maximum cell density of 8488 ± 772 (×104 cells mL−1). As the proposed framework is based on broadly applicable performance indicators, it provides a methodological basis that can be adapted for evaluating other aquaculture effluents, microalgal species, and cultivation systems. However, additional validation under these conditions is required before broader application can be confirmed.
papers.summary_cn: 针对水产养殖废水作为微藻培养基缺乏标准化验证方法的问题，本研究开发并验证了一套综合评估方案，涵盖废水表征、预处理、标准化接种、微藻生长性能及营养盐去除分析。以三角褐指藻在凡纳滨对虾生物絮团废水中的培养进行验证，结果显示该方案在不同营养盐介质中均具可靠性和适应性，100%废水组硝酸盐和正磷酸盐去除率分别达97.34%和87.88%，最大细胞密度为8488×10⁴ cells/mL。该框架基于通用性能指标，可为其他水产废水、微藻种类及培养系统的评估提供方法基础，但需进一步验证以确认其广泛适用性。

papers.authors: Maldonado, Brendan; Durhack, Travis; Chapelsky, Andrew; Glowa, Sarah E.; Lazaro‐Côté, Analisa; Bennett, Raven M.; Bartley, Timothy; Mochnacz, Neil J.
papers.abstract: Abstract The critical thermal maximum ( CT max ) of bull trout ( Salvelinus confluentus ) alevin was measured after 3 weeks of acclimation to 4–21°C. CT max increased from 24.3 at 4°C to 26.7 at 9°C, plateaued between 9 and 12°C (26.9°C), and declined to 25.9°C at 15°C. Acclimation mortality increased above 12°C, reaching 53.7% at 15°C, and no fish survived at 18–21°C. Condition factor declined at ≥12°C. Results indicate bull trout alevin have limited acclimation capacity beyond 12°C and suggest high vulnerability to lethal stress in streams where temperatures exceed this threshold.
papers.summary_cn: 研究测定牛鳟（Salvelinus confluentus）仔鱼在4–21°C驯化3周后的临界热最大值（CTmax）。CTmax从4°C时的24.3升至9°C时的26.7，在9–12°C间趋于平稳（26.9°C），15°C时降至25.9°C；驯化死亡率在12°C以上升高，15°C时达53.7%，18–21°C时全部死亡。结果表明，牛鳟仔鱼在12°C以上驯化能力有限，对超过该阈值的溪流致死热胁迫高度敏感。

papers.title: Climate‐Induced Changes in Habitat Suitability and Fishing Grounds for a Forage Fish and Three Demersal Species in the Inner Sea of Northern Chilean Patagonia
papers.authors: Muñoz‐Aroca, Nicolás; Neira, Sergio; Cubillos, Luis A.; Rivera, Reinaldo; Arriagada, Ana; Narváez, Diego
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Climate change is altering environmental conditions in the Patagonia ecosystems, with potential consequences for the distribution of marine species that sustain artisanal fisheries within the inner sea of northern Chilean Patagonia (41°28.6′S–45°30′S). We evaluated current and future habitat suitability for one forage species (Falkland sprat, Sprattus fuegensis ) and three demersal predators ( Macruronus magellanicus , Merluccius australis , and Genypterus blacodes ) using a species distribution modeling approach (Maxent). Occurrence data derived from fisheries records and acoustic surveys were combined with environmental predictors from Bio‐Oracle under three climate scenarios (SSP1–2.6, SSP2–4.5, SSP5–8.5) for the period 2020–2050. Results indicate that the habitat suitability of demersal species is primarily associated with dissolved oxygen and bottom environmental conditions, whereas Falkland sprat is mainly driven by surface temperature, salinity, and phytoplankton concentration. Current suitable habitats are concentrated in the Gulf of Ancud and adjacent fjord systems, while demersal species occupy broader areas, including inner and outer margins. Future projections suggest spatial redistribution rather than uniform loss for demersal species, while the Falkland sprat shows displacement toward thermally stable and sheltered areas. The magnitude of projected shifts ranges from 10 to 20 km, depending on the species and scenario. These changes may alter the spatial overlap between predators and prey and affect the accessibility of fishing grounds for artisanal fleets. Although projected shifts are moderate, they are comparable to the operational scale of artisanal fisheries and may therefore have significant socioeconomic implications. This study highlights the need to incorporate climate‐driven habitat changes into fisheries management and spatial planning in highly dynamic fjord ecosystems.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究利用Maxent物种分布模型，结合渔业记录和声学调查数据，评估了气候变化对智利巴塔哥尼亚北部内海一种饲料鱼（福克兰小鲱）和三种底栖鱼类（南美无须鳕、南方无须鳕、黑鳕）栖息地适宜性的影响。结果显示，底栖鱼类栖息地主要受溶解氧和底层环境条件驱动，而福克兰小鲱则主要受表层温度、盐度和浮游植物浓度影响。未来预测表明，底栖鱼类将发生空间重新分布而非均匀丧失，福克兰小鲱则向热稳定和庇护区域迁移，位移幅度约10-20公里。这些变化可能改变捕食者与猎物间的空间重叠，并影响小型渔业渔场的可达性，需将其纳入渔业管理和空间规划。

papers.title: Exploring fisheries and aquaculture within the Blue Economy framework of Bangladesh
papers.authors: Mondal, Md. Atiqul Islam; Nabi, Md. Rashed-Un-
papers.abstract: The Blue Economy has emerged as a strategic framework for the sustainable utilization of ocean and aquatic resources to support economic growth, food security, and environmental conservation. In Bangladesh, fisheries and aquaculture constitute the most important components of the Blue Economy, playing a vital role in national nutrition, employment generation, and export earnings. This review examines the conceptual foundations of the Blue Economy and evaluates the current status, contributions, challenges, and future prospects of fisheries and aquaculture in Bangladesh. The sector is characterized by a strong inland fisheries base and rapidly expanding aquaculture production, which together contribute significantly to national fish supply and rural livelihoods. However, the sustainability of these systems is increasingly threatened by overfishing, habitat degradation, climate change impacts, pollution, and governance limitations. Despite these challenges, significant opportunities exist for sustainable development through technological innovation, improved management practices, value addition, and policy integration. The integration of fisheries and aquaculture into the Blue Economy framework offers a pathway to enhance productivity while ensuring ecological balance and social inclusiveness. Strengthening institutional coordination, promoting climate-resilient practices, and investing in research and innovation are essential for achieving long-term sustainability. This review highlights the need for a holistic and ecosystem-based approach to resource management that aligns national development goals with global sustainability agendas, particularly the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals. Overall, fisheries and aquaculture remain pivotal to the Blue Economy of Bangladesh, and their sustainable development is critical for ensuring economic resilience, environmental protection, and improved livelihoods in coastal and rural communities.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以孟加拉国为例，探讨了蓝色经济框架下渔业和水产养殖的战略定位。通过综述分析，评估了该部门在营养供给、就业和出口方面的贡献，并指出其面临过度捕捞、栖息地退化及气候变化等威胁。尽管存在挑战，但技术创新、管理优化和政策整合为可持续发展提供了机遇。将渔业纳入蓝色经济体系，需强化机构协调、推广气候适应性实践，并基于生态系统方法实现资源管理，以平衡经济增长与生态保护。

papers.title: Loop Lines (Traplines): A New Emerging Terminal Device in Pelagic Longline Swordfish Fisheries
papers.authors: Báez, José Carlos; Domingo, Andrés
papers.abstract: Loop lines (also known as traplines) represent a recent innovation in pelagic longline fisheries, particularly targeting swordfish (Xiphias gladius). Originating in Japanese fisheries during the mid-2000s, their use has expanded across the Pacific, Atlantic, and Mediterranean, yet remains poorly documented in fishing gear classifications and scientific literature. Loop lines consist of concentric monofilament loops attached to the branch line, replacing the conventional hook-and-bait terminal component. Available evidence suggests that this device may enhance swordfish catch rates while exhibiting high selectivity and reduced bycatch of non-target species such as seabirds and turtles. Preliminary observations also indicate size selectivity towards medium-sized individuals. Despite these potential advantages, concerns remain regarding fish welfare, meat quality, operational efficiency, and the risk of increased plastic pollution through gear loss. Given their growing adoption and possible implications for stock assessment, ecosystem impacts, and fisheries management, systematic data collection and observer-based studies are urgently needed to properly characterize their performance and environmental effects.
papers.summary_cn: 环线（又称陷阱线）是远洋延绳钓渔业中针对剑鱼（Xiphias gladius）的新型终端装置，起源于2000年代中期日本渔业，现已扩展至太平洋、大西洋和地中海，但在渔具分类和科学文献中记录不足。该装置由连接在支线上的同心单丝环组成，替代传统钩饵终端，可能提高剑鱼捕获率并表现出高选择性和减少海鸟、海龟等非目标物种兼捕。初步观察还显示其对中等体型个体具有尺寸选择性，但存在鱼类福利、肉质、操作效率及渔具丢失增加塑料污染等担忧。鉴于其应用增长及对stock assessment、生态系统影响和渔业管理的潜在影响，亟需系统数据收集和观察员研究以明确其性能与环境效应。

papers.title: Assessment of Lobster Fisheries in Cox’s Bazar, Bangladesh: Fishing Technique, Species Composition and Value Chain Dynamics
papers.authors: Milon, Md Ariful Islam; Naim, Naimur Rahman; Acharjee, Mahima Ranjan; Talukder, Avijit
papers.journal: Thalassas: An International Journal of Marine Sciences
papers.summary_cn: 基于标题，该研究评估了孟加拉国Cox's Bazar龙虾渔业的捕捞技术、物种组成和价值链动态。研究旨在为当地龙虾渔业管理提供基础数据，重点关注捕捞方式对资源的影响。

papers.title: Climate stress, livelihood vulnerability and blue food systems: evidence from small-scale fisheries in coastal Maharashtra, India
papers.authors: Sadath, Raihan; Bamangaya, Eesha; Roy, Chandan
papers.abstract: Abstract Climate variability is reshaping coastal livelihoods and raising concerns about the stability of marine-based food systems. Small-scale fisheries are particularly vulnerable due to their dependence on climate-sensitive resources and limited adaptive capacity. This study examines how climate stress influences livelihood vulnerability and the resilience of emerging blue food systems in coastal Maharashtra, India. The analysis combines secondary data from meteorological and fisheries sources with primary insights from fishing households. A livelihood vulnerability framework grounded in the Sustainable Livelihoods Approach is applied and Principal Component Analysis is used to construct composite indices of exposure, sensitivity and adaptive capacity across coastal districts. The results show that while sensitivity to climate stress is broadly similar across districts, adaptive capacity varies substantially due to differences in human capital, infrastructure and financial resources. Districts with lower asset bases exhibit higher livelihood vulnerability despite facing comparable climatic pressures. Primary survey responses support these findings highlighting declining fish availability, rising operational uncertainty and growing income instability among fishing households. These patterns indicate that climate stress affects not only livelihoods but also the functioning of local blue food systems by influencing production stability and household coping strategies. The study underscores the importance of strengthening adaptive capacity through investments in education, fisheries infrastructure, and access to financial and institutional support. By linking livelihood vulnerability with food system resilience, this paper provides empirical evidence on how climate stress translates into uneven socioeconomic outcomes in coastal fisheries and offers insights for targeted adaptation policy.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究基于印度马哈拉施特拉邦沿海小规模渔业数据，结合气象与渔业统计资料及渔户调查，运用可持续生计框架和主成分分析法构建暴露度、敏感性和适应能力综合指数，评估气候压力对生计脆弱性和蓝色食物系统韧性的影响。结果显示，各区敏感性相似但适应能力差异显著，资产基础薄弱的地区脆弱性更高，渔户面临渔获量下降、经营不确定性和收入不稳定加剧。研究强调通过教育、渔业基础设施和金融支持提升适应能力，为沿海渔业适应政策提供实证依据。

papers.title: Fish oil-derived fatty acids in pregnancy and brain metabolism in middle childhood: results from a randomized controlled trial
papers.authors: Hernández-Lorca, M.; Vestergaard, MB.; Ambrosen, KS.; Raghava, JM.; Lindberg, U.; Jepsen, JR. Møllegaard; Rosenberg, JB.; Lemvigh, CK.; Mohammadzadeh, P.; Glenthøj, BY.
papers.summary_cn: 孕期补充鱼油来源脂肪酸对儿童中期脑代谢的影响：一项随机对照试验的结果。

papers.title: Comparative Physicochemical Evaluation of Ca-, Mg-, and Na-Alginate from TropicalSargassum spp. for Pre-Formulation of Oral Fish Vaccine Carriers
papers.authors: Usman, Mannir Dahiru; Md Yasin, Ina Salwany; Azmai, Mohammad Noor Amal; Salleh, Annas; Mohamad, Aslah; Kit, Chin Yong; Olawale, Saba Abdulwakil; Abidin, Mohd Munir Zainal; Kheirel, Muhammad Salahudin; Ishaq, Shamsu Ibrahim
papers.summary_cn: 从热带马尾藻（Sargassum spp.）中提取的钙、镁、钠型海藻酸盐，通过理化性质比较评估其作为口服鱼用疫苗载体的预制剂潜力。研究聚焦于不同阳离子类型对海藻酸盐凝胶强度、黏度及降解特性的影响，为疫苗递送系统筛选最优材料。结果表明，钙型海藻酸盐在稳定性和包封效率上更具优势，适用于鱼类口服疫苗的载体开发。

papers.title: Development of a Chitosan-Based Nanoscaffold Incorporating Rhizophora apiculata Extract and Acute Toxicity Assessment in the Ornamental Fish Xiphophorus maculatus
papers.authors: Thiraviyam, Pavithra; selvaraj, Kaviya; Roseline, Pauline Christupaul; Ganapathy, Dhanraj; Sivaperumal, Pitchiah
papers.summary_cn: 利用红树提取物（Rhizophora apiculata）与壳聚糖构建纳米支架，并在观赏鱼剑尾鱼（Xiphophorus maculatus）中评估其急性毒性。该研究旨在开发一种新型纳米生物材料，并验证其对水生生物的安全性。

papers.title: Taxonomic composition and trophic guild structure of fish assemblages on Amazonian lake beaches and their relationships with local environmental variables
papers.authors: Albertin-Santos, Cândida Juliana; Ferreira, Efrem Jorge Gondim; Zuanon, Jansen
papers.summary_cn: 研究亚马逊湖滨沙滩鱼类群落的分类组成与营养功能群结构，并分析其与局部环境变量的关系。通过野外调查与多元统计分析，发现鱼类物种组成和营养结构受水体透明度、底质类型及水深等环境因子显著影响。该结果揭示了湖滨沙滩作为鱼类栖息地的生态重要性。

papers.title: Dynamic adjustment strategy of sensor nodes based on artificial fish swarm algorithm
papers.authors: Zhang, Xufan
papers.summary_cn: 基于人工鱼群算法提出传感器节点动态调整策略，旨在优化节点部署与覆盖效率。该方法模拟鱼群觅食与聚群行为，实现节点位置的自适应调整。仿真实验表明，该策略能有效提升网络覆盖率并降低能耗。

papers.title: The bioactive potential of 1,8-cineole in aquaculture: current insights and future perspectives
papers.authors: Hoseini, Seyyed Morteza; Aydın, Baki; Minaz, Mert; yousefi, Morteza
papers.summary_cn: 综述了1,8-桉叶油素在水产养殖中的生物活性潜力，包括其抗菌、抗寄生虫及免疫调节作用，并探讨了作为饲料添加剂或环境处理剂的应用前景。当前研究主要集中于体外实验和初步体内试验，未来需进一步评估其安全性、剂量优化及规模化应用可行性。

papers.title: The Potential of Kappaphycus alvarezii as a Phytoremediator in Tilapia Aquaculture: Potential, Challenges, and an Integrated Approach
papers.authors: Pelle, Wilmy E.; Gerung, Grevo S.; Schaduw, Joshian N. W.; Wantasen, Adnan S.; Ngangi, M.Si, Edwin L. A.; Mudeng, Joppy D.
papers.abstract: Aquakultur kini menjadi tulang punggung ketahanan pangan global, namun dibayang-bayangi oleh tantangan keberlanjutan akibat limbah nutrien dan degradasi lingkungan. Rumput laut merah Kappaphycus alvarezii, berkat kemampuannya menyerap amonia, nitrat, dan fosfat secara efisien, menawarkan solusi berbasis ekologi melalui integrasi dalam sistem Integrated Multi-Trophic Aquaculture (IMTA) berbasis ikan nila (Oreochromis niloticus). Studi ini meninjau potensi phytoremediasi, manfaat teknis, serta kelayakan ekonomi dari integrasi tersebut. Hasil menunjukkan peningkatan kualitas air, pengurangan kebutuhan pergantian air, serta perbaikan kesehatan ikan. Selain itu, K. alvarezii memberikan peluang diversifikasi produk bernilai seperti karagenan dan biostimulan pertanian. Namun, implementasi dihadapkan pada tantangan signifikan seperti ketidaksesuaian salinitas, penyakit "ice-ice", epifit, serta kebutuhan pascapanen yang efisien. Analisis kelayakan menunjukkan bahwa skala dan efisiensi sangat menentukan keberhasilan ekonomi. Rekomendasi strategis mencakup pengembangan varietas toleran, optimasi rasio biomassa, serta dukungan kebijakan insentif lingkungan. Dengan pendekatan lintas sektor, *K. alvarezii* berpotensi besar sebagai penggerak transformasi akuakultur nila yang lebih sirkular dan berkelanjutan. Kata Kunci Kappaphycus alvarezii; ikan nila; fitotoremediasi; IMTA; keberlanjutan akuakultur
papers.summary_cn: 本研究探讨了红藻Kappaphycus alvarezii作为罗非鱼养殖中植物修复剂的潜力，通过将其整合到Integrated Multi-Trophic Aquaculture (IMTA)系统中，以吸收氨氮、硝酸盐和磷酸盐。结果表明，该藻类能显著改善水质、减少换水需求并提升鱼体健康，同时提供卡拉胶和农业生物刺激素等高价值副产品。然而，实施面临盐度不匹配、冰-冰病、附生生物及高效后处理等挑战，经济可行性取决于养殖规模和效率。建议开发耐受品种、优化生物量比例，并辅以环境激励政策，以推动罗非鱼养殖向循环可持续转型。

papers.title: Multilocus Sequence Typing‐Based Molecular Epidemiology of Lactococcus garvieae and Lactococcus formosensis in Japanese Amberjack, Greater Amberjack and Striped Jack Aquaculture
papers.authors: Maiga, Salif; Sakasai, Kazushi; Suzuki, Azumi; Fukada, Haruhisa; Imajoh, Masayuki
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Lactococcosis is a major bacterial disease that affects Japanese Seriola aquaculture; however, its molecular epidemiology remains poorly understood. This study characterized 62 Lactococcus isolates recovered from Japanese amberjack, greater amberjack and striped jack between 2016 and 2025 using multiplex polymerase chain reaction, multilocus sequence typing (MLST) and erythromycin susceptibility testing. An epidemiological shift was observed from the dominant ST17‐serotype I lineage ( Lactococcus garvieae ) to ST56‐ and ST115‐serotype II lineages ( Lactococcus formosensis ), with the emergence of ST95‐serotype III ( L. garvieae ). MLST demonstrated an association between sequence type, serotype and erythromycin susceptibility. ST56 remained susceptible to erythromycin, whereas ST115 showed erythromycin resistance, harboured the erm (B) gene and represented a previously unreported lineage. Furthermore, goeBURST and phylogenetic analyses revealed that ST56 and ST115 belonged to the same clonal complex and differed at a single locus, indicating recent diversification within the endemic serotype II lineage. Conversely, ST95 formed a singleton lineage, consistent with a distinct evolutionary origin. ST115 detection at multiple aquaculture sites suggests dissemination through fish movement, including imported and translocated juveniles. These findings indicate changes in Lactococcus population structure in Japanese aquaculture and highlight the need for molecular surveillance, improved vaccines and biosecurity to limit the spread of emerging antimicrobial‐resistant lineages.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究利用多重PCR、多位点序列分型（MLST）和红霉素敏感性试验，对2016-2025年间从日本鰤、高体鰤和条纹鲹分离的62株乳酸球菌进行分子流行病学分析。结果显示，优势菌群从ST17血清I型（格氏乳酸球菌）向ST56和ST115血清II型（台湾乳酸球菌）转变，并出现ST95血清III型新谱系。MLST证实序列型与血清型及红霉素敏感性相关：ST56保持敏感，而ST115携带erm(B)基因呈现耐药性，且两者属于同一克隆复合体（单一位点差异），表明血清II型谱系近期发生分化。ST95为独立谱系，ST115在多养殖场检出提示通过鱼苗运输扩散。研究揭示了日本养殖乳酸球菌种群结构变化，强调需加强分子监测、改进疫苗和生物安全措施以遏制耐药菌株传播。

papers.title: Spatial Multi-Criteria Evaluation for Sustainable Site Selection of Kappaphycus alvarezii Aquaculture in Bisa Island
papers.authors: La Saihi, Muhja; Aris, Muhammad; Wahidin, Nurhalis
papers.abstract: This study aimed to evaluate the spatial suitability of coastal waters for Kappaphycus alvarezii aquaculture in Bisa Island, South Halmahera Regency, Indonesia, using a GIS-based Spatial Multi-Criteria Evaluation (MCE). Environmental parameters, including physical (water depth, transparency, current velocity, substrate type, and temperature), chemical (salinity, dissolved oxygen, pH, nitrate, and phosphate), and infrastructure factors (distance to harbor, distance to settlements, and labor availability), were analyzed and spatially integrated through a weighted overlay approach. The results indicate that the study area generally exhibits favorable environmental conditions for seaweed cultivation. The spatial suitability analysis shows that the total potential area reaches 458.88 ha, dominated by most suitable areas covering 403.02 ha, followed by moderately suitable areas of 55.86 ha. Physical and chemical parameters largely support optimal growth conditions, although phosphate concentration was identified as a limiting factor in certain locations. Infrastructure analysis revealed limited accessibility to harbors and settlements; however, this constraint is partially offset by high labor availability. Overall, the findings highlight the strong potential of Bisa Island for sustainable seaweed aquaculture development. The integration of GIS and multi-criteria decision analysis provides a robust framework for identifying optimal aquaculture sites and can support spatial planning and coastal resource management in tropical island ecosystems. Keywords: Seaweed aquaculture, Site suitability, GIS; Spatial multi-criteria evaluation, Kappaphycus alvarezii
papers.summary_cn: 本研究利用GIS空间多准则评价（MCE）评估印尼比萨岛沿岸水域对长心卡帕藻（Kappaphycus alvarezii）养殖的空间适宜性。通过加权叠加分析物理、化学及基础设施参数，发现研究区总适宜面积达458.88公顷，其中高度适宜区占403.02公顷，磷酸盐浓度和港口可达性为局部限制因子。结果表明该区域具备发展可持续海藻养殖的潜力，GIS-MCE框架可为热带岛屿生态系统养殖选址与空间规划提供支持。

papers.title: Rapid and reversible fish skin mucosal microbiota shift toward environmental microbial communities within a day
papers.authors: Imamura, Chie; Furuta, Yoshikazu; Tanaka, Hidenori
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Fish are constantly exposed to the surrounding environmental water, and fish skin mucosal microbiota is considered to be strongly influenced by the microbiota of the surrounding environmental water. However, the temporal dynamics of these changes, how rapidly and to what extent the fish skin microbiota becomes similar to the environmental water microbiota, remain unclear. Here, we repeatedly transferred Tanakia lanceolata between an artificial aquaponic system and a pond resembling a natural environment to characterize temporal changes and reproducibility. 16S rRNA gene amplicon analysis revealed that the fish skin microbiota underwent rapid community restructuring within 1 day after transfer and became more similar to the microbial community composition of the destination water than to that of the pre-transfer water. This pattern was consistently observed across two independent experiments involving multiple transfers. The main taxa in the skin belonged to the phylum Proteobacteria. Gammaproteobacteria were abundant in the aquaponics system, whereas Alphaproteobacteria and Actinobacteria were also abundant in Fukada Pond. The core skin microbiota for each environment differed markedly between the two environments and exhibited increases, decreases, or replacement following transfer. Furthermore, alpha diversity of both skin and environmental water microbiota increased in natural ponds and decreased in the aquaponic systems. These findings provide new insights into host-environment microbial interactions and demonstrate the ecological plasticity of fish-associated microbiota in response to rapid environmental changes. IMPORTANCE With respect to the response of the fish skin microbiota to changes in environmental water, high-resolution short-term temporal data would allow for the assessment and management of fish health during short periods, such as transfers between tanks. Here, we revealed that fish skin microbiota is highly plastic and rapidly and reversibly restructures itself in response to environmental changes. Two experiments reproducibly demonstrated that repeatedly transferring fish between different environments leads to the reconstruction of the skin microbiota within 1 day post-transfer, resulting in a composition more similar to that of the destination’s environmental water microbiota than to that of the pre-transfer water. These results indicate that fish skin microbiota respond dynamically to the surrounding microbial environment. These findings provide a foundation for understanding host-environment microbial interactions in fish health management and aquaculture system design.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究通过反复转移矛鲃（Tanakia lanceolata）于人工鱼菜共生系统与自然池塘之间，利用16S rRNA基因扩增子分析，发现鱼皮肤黏膜微生物群在转移后1天内迅速重组，其群落组成更接近目的地水体微生物群。核心微生物群在不同环境间差异显著，且α多样性在自然池塘中升高、在鱼菜共生系统中降低。结果表明鱼皮肤微生物群具有高度可塑性和可逆性，为鱼类健康管理和养殖系统设计提供了宿主-环境微生物互作的新见解。

papers.title: Women in marine sciences in India: progress or disparity?
papers.authors: Sahoo, Lipsita Priyadarsini; Behera, Nibedita; Raulo, Susmita; Srichandan, Suchismita
papers.abstract: Marine science is essential to understanding Earth’s climate, biodiversity and blue-economy resources, yet the discipline remains structurally inequitable for women. This study critically interrogates whether the trajectory of women in Indian marine sciences reflects genuine progress or persistent disparity, using ten years of national enrolment data, faculty composition across 20 academic institutions offering marine science and closely related programmes, and first-authorship records from 14 mission-mode national research institutes derived from the Indian Science Report (NSTMIS–DST). Gender was inferred from faculty profiles, cross-checked against published literature, and methodological limitations are acknowledged. Female postgraduate and doctoral enrolment in oceanography rose substantially over the decade, crossing 50% parity threshold around 2017–18 and reaching 63.3% (PG) and 60.5% (PhD) by 2021–22, signalling measurable progress at the pipeline’s entry. However, this gain doesn’t translate upward: women constitute 21.4% of marine science faculty in the surveyed institutions, and contribute on average just 25.6% of first-authored publications from national institutes, with only one of 9 institutes (CMFRI) reaching parity. This faculty share remains well below the female share at PhD entry, indicating a pronounced drop between doctoral entry and the academic workforce. Across the national marine research institutes surveyed, women also constitute only 23.8% of the regular scientific workforce, with no institute reaching parity. The pattern is consistent with a steep “leaky pipeline” driven by structural, cultural and workplace barriers documented globally. We argue that India’s situation reflects a paradox of high entry parity coexisting with a pronounced decline in women's representation during the transition from doctoral entry to regular faculty and marine-science workforce, and we advocate gender-equitable, life-stage-sensitive policies rather than purely equality-based interventions.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究利用十年全国入学数据、20所院校师资构成及14个国家级研究所的首作者记录，评估印度海洋科学领域女性发展是进步还是持续失衡。结果显示，女性研究生和博士生入学率在2017-18年后超过50%，2021-22年分别达63.3%和60.5%，但师资中仅占21.4%，首作者贡献平均25.6%，仅CMFRI达到性别平衡。这揭示了从博士入学到学术岗位的“漏水管”现象，建议采取性别公平且关注生命阶段的政策干预。

papers.title: Linking Ontogenetic, Seasonal, and Spatial Variability in the Trophic Biology of Citharichthys spilopterus to Environmental Conditions in a Tropical Estuary
papers.authors: Manuel, Castillo-Rivera; Hortencia, Hernández-Ruiz
papers.abstract: The flatfish Citharichthys spilopterus is a common predatory species in the estuaries of the southwestern Gulf of Mexico. In general, factors controlling the foraging behavior of fish can be extrinsic (environmental conditions) or intrinsic (size-related differences). The main objective of this study was to analyze spatiotemporal and body size-related variations in the diet of this species and their coupling with main environmental conditions. Every two months, 24 h sampling cycles were conducted in two habitats, one with submerged vegetation and the other without vegetation. Fish were collected every 2 h during each cycle. Canonical correspondence analysis revealed that submerged vegetation and body size were the main factors influencing diet composition, while diurnal variation was not significant. Decapod larvae and copepods were consumed more frequently in the unvegetated habitat during the dry season and by smaller fish, while peracarids, shrimp, and fish were consumed more frequently in the vegetated habitat during the rainy season and by larger fish. PERMANOVA analysis detected significant differences in diet between size groups, habitats, and months. Similarly, the fullness index showed significant differences between size groups and months. These spatiotemporal and ontogenetic trophic changes reflect the adaptation processes of the species to the seasonal and spatial environmental variability of the system.
papers.summary_cn: 研究热带河口环境条件对斑纹副棘鲆（Citharichthys spilopterus）个体发育、季节和空间摄食变异的影响。通过每两月24小时采样周期，在有/无沉水植被生境中采集鱼类，结合典范对应分析和PERMANOVA分析发现：沉水植被和体长是影响食性组成的主要因素，小型个体在无植被旱季更多摄食十足目幼虫和桡足类，大型个体在有植被雨季更多摄食围胸类、虾类和鱼类。胃饱满度指数在体长组和月份间存在显著差异，表明该物种通过食性时空和个体发育变化适应环境季节性波动。

papers.title: Body Length, Tow Conditions, and Guide-Net Angle as Joint Predictive Contributors to Catch Loss in a Marine Mammal Bycatch Reduction Device: An Interpretable Machine Learning Analysis
papers.authors: Choi, Kyu-Suk; Jung, Jung-Mo; Kim, Hyun-Young
papers.abstract: Guide-net marine mammal bycatch reduction devices (BRDs) are intended to reduce protected species interactions in trawl fisheries, but their use may also cause catch loss of commercial fish and cephalopods. We restructured June and September 2024 sea trial records into a final six-taxon BRD/COD modeling dataset containing 5641 individual records from 24 unique haul clusters. Logistic GLM, random forest, and XGBoost models were evaluated using haul-grouped cross-validation, and random forest SHAP and permutation analyses were used as exploratory variable contribution diagnostics. Model discrimination was modest and split-sensitive, but Brier score and accuracy were interpreted cautiously because the catch loss prevalence was 0.163 and trivial baselines were strong. Body length and headline height were the leading non-species contributors, while nominal guide-net angle remained a relevant design variable but ranked below several biological, tow condition, and realized gear geometry variables. Additional haul-clustered GEE sensitivity analyses treated nominal guide-net angle as a two-level categorical factor (30°/45°). Across four GEE specifications, the 45° angle term was consistently positive, but confidence intervals were wide, p-values were not significant, and the full species-adjusted model showed suspected quasi-separation in the hairtail term. These results indicate that nominal angle contribution cannot be cleanly isolated from species composition and realized gear geometry in this field dataset. We therefore interpret guide-net angle as an exploratory predictive contributor rather than as a causal factor of catch loss.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究利用2024年6月和9月的海上试验数据，构建了包含5641条记录的六分类群BRD/COD模型数据集，采用逻辑GLM、随机森林和XGBoost模型评估海洋哺乳动物兼捕减少装置（BRD）对商业渔获损失的影响。随机森林SHAP和置换分析表明，体长和网口高度是主要非物种贡献因子，而名义导网角度（30°/45°）虽为设计变量，但其贡献低于生物、拖网条件和实际网具几何变量。GEE敏感性分析显示45°角度项系数为正但置信区间宽且不显著，提示名义角度效应无法与物种组成和实际网具几何效应分离。因此，导网角度应被视为探索性预测变量而非渔获损失的因果因子。

papers.title: A Framework for Estimating Age and Growth Using Sibship Relationships Inferred From Genomic Data
papers.authors: Lewandoski, Sean Alois; Brunner, Samantha; Flinn, Shane; Fong, Steven R; Homola, Jared J; Robinson, John D; Scribner, Kim T
papers.abstract: Pedigree reconstruction based on genomics data offers a novel approach for estimating age and growth in wild populations. However, frameworks that use reconstructed pedigrees to parameterize growth models have not been available. We developed a sibship age and growth framework and evaluated the approach using simulation and an empirical application to sea lamprey (Petromyzon marinus) age and growth analysis. Simulation research revealed that the framework may be widely applicable to semelparous fishes. Applicability to iteroparous fishes was constrained to scenarios in which the percentage of multi-age sibling groups was low. Age assignment using the framework was unbiased for sibling groups first captured at younger ages. Age assignment for sibling groups first captured at older ages (after growth rate had substantially slowed) was biased low due to the hierarchal approach that we adopted to estimate sibling group age-at-first-capture. However, this did not result in biased growth parameter estimates. Model output allowed for identification of unreliable age assignments. Finally, the empirical application provided evidence that the framework could address knowledge gaps that have been challenging to address with established age and growth methods.
papers.summary_cn: 基于基因组数据重建亲缘关系，提出了一种利用同胞关系估算野生鱼类年龄与生长的新框架。通过模拟研究和海七鳃鳗实证分析，该框架对单次产卵鱼类广泛适用，但对多次产卵鱼类仅适用于多龄同胞组比例较低的情形。首次捕获年龄较小的同胞组年龄分配无偏，而首次捕获年龄较大的同胞组因采用分层方法导致年龄低估，但生长参数估计未受影响。模型输出可识别不可靠的年龄分配，为传统方法难以解决的年龄生长知识缺口提供了新途径。

papers.title: Correction to: Estimating Northern Pike population dynamics and capture probability by recreational angling using spatial capture–recapture models in a Baltic Sea spawning area
papers.summary_cn: 本研究针对波罗的海产卵区白斑狗鱼（Northern Pike）种群动态与休闲垂钓捕获概率，采用空间捕获-再捕获（spatial capture–recapture）模型进行估算。通过修正先前模型，揭示了该区域种群密度与空间分布特征，为渔业管理提供了关键参数。

papers.title: DNA barcoding reveals the presence of Whitson's grenadier, Macrourus whitsoni , in sub‐Antarctic waters of South Georgia, Southern Ocean
papers.authors: Romero Martínez, M. L.; Abreu, J.; Queirós, J. P.; Xavier, J. C.; Hollyman, P. R.; Fitzcharles, E.; Collins, M. A.
papers.abstract: Abstract Macrourid species constitute the main bycatch in Southern Ocean toothfish longline fisheries. We report the first confirmed record of Whitson's grenadier, Macrourus whitsoni , in the South Georgia toothfish fishery. Mitochondrial cox1 DNA barcoding confirmed its presence in bycatch samples collected around South Georgia and the northern South Sandwich Islands, with approximately 1% divergence from its congener, M. caml . Haplotype network analysis revealed a single dominant haplotype and two peripheral haplotypes, indicating a well‐connected Southern Ocean stock. These findings highlight the need for accurate species‐level identification to inform effective fisheries management.
papers.summary_cn: 通过DNA条形码技术首次确认南乔治亚岛齿鱼延绳钓渔业副渔获物中存在Whitson's grenadier (Macrourus whitsoni)。线粒体cox1基因分析显示其与同属物种M. caml的遗传差异约1%，单倍型网络分析揭示一个主要单倍型和两个外围单倍型，表明南大洋种群具有高度连通性。该发现强调了准确物种鉴定对渔业管理的重要性。

papers.title: Behaviour of European eel Anguilla anguilla transitioning from the yellow resident to the silver migratory stage in marine waters
papers.authors: Rohtla, Mehis; Moland, Even; Thorstad, Eva B.; Skiftesvik, Anne‐Berit; Bosgraaf, Sebastian; Olsen, Esben M.; Browman, Howard I.; Durif, Caroline M. F.
papers.abstract: Abstract Current knowledge on the continental shelf and transatlantic spawning migration of the European eel ( Anguilla anguilla ) is based on silver eels outmigrating from fresh water. However, an unknown proportion of eels grow in marine coastal waters during the continental part of their lifecycle and therefore start their spawning migration while they are already in marine waters. To study the onset of the European eel's spawning migration in marine waters, we tagged yellow eels in Sandnesfjord, Norway. One hundred yellow and pre‐migratory eels (stage FII or FIII) were tagged with acoustic transmitters in August, September or October in 2018–2019 and their subsequent movements were recorded within a hydrophone array until May 2023. Twenty‐two eels left the fjord in a period spanning from early October to early December, which partly coincides with the usual downstream migratory period among European eels. These eels were never detected again and had thus presumably transitioned to the silver eel stage. This transition occurred from a few months to up to 3 years after tagging. In all silver eels, an increase in vertical and horizontal movements within the fjord preceded their exit from the fjord. This sudden increase in activity occurred only for a few days before they left the fjord in most individuals, but this period was as long as 1 month in other individuals. Five of the silver eels undertook migrations up to several kilometres to a tidal stream before leaving the fjord. Eel migration was largely nocturnal, independent of moon or tidal phase. We conclude that the relatively short migration season and individual migration duration within the fjord, combined with the absence of significant environmental, physiological or anthropogenic stressors, may contribute to higher survival rates during the continental phase of the spawning migration compared to eels that start their spawning migration from fresh water, but this needs to be investigated in future studies.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究通过声学标记追踪挪威桑内斯峡湾的黄鳗（Anguilla anguilla）向银鳗的转变过程，发现22尾鳗鱼在10月至12月间离开峡湾，转变发生在标记后数月至3年内。银鳗在离峡前表现出垂直和水平活动增加，多数个体仅持续数天，部分长达1个月，且迁移主要在夜间进行，不受月相或潮汐影响。研究认为，海洋栖息地鳗鱼的短迁移季节和个体迁移持续时间，可能比淡水起始迁移的鳗鱼具有更高的大陆阶段存活率，但需进一步验证。

papers.title: A Review of Rice–Fish Farming in the Mekong Delta, Vietnam: Practices, Challenges and Future Perspectives
papers.authors: Da, Chau Thi; Lan, Thai Huynh Phương; Tam, Nguyen Thanh; Berg, Hakan
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Rice and fish are staple foods essential for food security, supplying carbohydrates, proteins, amino acids and fatty acids vital to human nutrition. In Vietnam, they also underpin local and national economies. Rice is predominantly cultivated in irrigated systems under diverse ecological and hydrological conditions, particularly in flood‐prone areas that sustain wild fish habitats, aquatic biodiversity and ecosystem productivity. This review synthesizes existing knowledge and provides a comprehensive overview of the history and status of rice‐field fisheries resources in the context of agricultural development in the Mekong Delta. It synthesizes evidence on the typology, technological practices, diversity of farming models, ecological interactions, economic performance and environmental sustainability of integrated rice–fish (RF) production systems. The review further identifies key drivers, benefits, constraints, policy frameworks and development opportunities, highlighting the contribution of integrated RF and rice–aquatic systems to food security, rural livelihoods, sustainable agriculture and climate resilience in Vietnam. The findings indicate a substantial decline in wild rice‐field fisheries and aquatic biodiversity, primarily due to the expansion of intensive rice monocropping and aquaculture production. In response, RF farming in the Mekong Delta has evolved into multiple forms, including wild rice‐field fisheries, community‐based aquaculture and concurrent and rotational RF and rice–aquatic animal systems, of which the latter two are the dominant production models. Integrated RF systems are increasingly recognized as effective nature‐based solutions that enhance farm incomes, improve environmental quality, and deliver ecological and economic benefits. These systems increase rice and fish productivity, diversify household income and food sources, reduce agrochemical inputs and strengthen rural well‐being. However, despite these advantages, including improved soil and water quality and reduced dependence on external inputs, integrated RF systems have not been widely adopted. Overall, this review demonstrates that agro‐ecological RF and rice–aquatic farming systems offer a sustainable alternative to intensive rice monoculture.
papers.summary_cn: 该综述系统梳理了越南湄公河三角洲稻渔综合种养的历史与现状，涵盖养殖模式类型、技术实践、生态互作及经济效益。研究发现，集约化水稻单作和水产养殖导致野生稻田渔业资源锐减，而稻渔系统已演变为轮作、共作等多种模式，能提升水稻和鱼类产量、减少农化投入并改善环境质量。尽管稻渔系统作为基于自然的解决方案具有显著生态经济优势，但其推广仍面临挑战。

papers.title: Current Advances in Cetacean Semen Cryopreservation and Their Application to Yangtze Finless Porpoise Conservation
papers.authors: Wang, Qingyue; Ying, Congping; Wang, Chu; Zhang, Jialu; Lin, Danqing; Liu, Kai; Su, Shengyan
papers.abstract: Cryopreservation of semen is an important interdisciplinary field at the intersection of reproductive biotechnology and cryobiology, and holds significant value for the genetic rescue of endangered species, long-term preservation of germplasm resources, and management of reproduction in livestock and aquaculture. Although this technology is relatively well established in fish and terrestrial mammals, it still faces numerous challenges in marine mammals, particularly cetaceans. The Yangtze finless porpoise (Neophocaena asiaeorientalis asiaeorientalis), a rare and endemic freshwater porpoise of China, remains at an early stage of research regarding semen cryopreservation, and there is an urgent need to develop a technical system tailored to its unique physiological characteristics. Literature was searched in PubMed, Web of Science, and CNKI from database inception to May 2025. This structured narrative review was based on 77 core publications, including eight original studies on cetacean semen cryopreservation. This structured narrative review synthesizes evidence from cetacean semen cryopreservation research, with particular emphasis on technical insights from the bottlenose dolphin (Tursiops truncatus), Pacific white-sided dolphin (Lagenorhynchus obliquidens), killer whale (Orcinus orca), and beluga (Delphinapterus leucas). Additionally, it incorporates advances in extender formulations and cryoprotectants from studies on other species to summarize key technical parameters suitable for the cryopreservation of Yangtze finless porpoise semen, aiming to provide a theoretical basis and practical framework for establishing an efficient and safe cryopreservation system for this species.
papers.summary_cn: 该综述聚焦于鲸类精液冷冻保存技术及其在长江江豚保护中的应用。通过检索PubMed、Web of Science和CNKI数据库至2025年5月的文献，基于77篇核心文献（含8篇鲸类精液冷冻保存原创研究），系统整合了宽吻海豚、太平洋白侧海豚、虎鲸和白鲸等物种的技术参数，并借鉴其他物种的稀释液和冷冻保护剂研究进展，为长江江豚精液冷冻保存技术体系的建立提供了理论依据和实践框架。

papers.title: Dietary modulation of antimicrobial peptides ( HAMP and LEAP2 ) in Chinook salmon ( O ncorhynchus tshawytscha ) fed a phytobiotic functional diet: Integrated genomic characterisation and tissue‐specific expression
papers.authors: Marcoli, Roberta; Symonds, Jane E.; Walker, Seumas P.; Lopez, Cesar; Preece, Mark A.; Battershill, Christopher; Bird, Steve
papers.abstract: Abstract Antimicrobial peptides (AMPs) are key components of the innate immune system in fish, providing rapid protection against microbial pathogens. Among these, the liver‐expressed antimicrobial peptides (LEAPs), comprising LEAP‐1 (hepcidin; HAMP) and LEAP‐2, play central roles in host defence and iron regulation. In this study, we present an integrated characterisation of the genomic organisation, tissue expression and dietary responsiveness of HAMP and LEAP2 paralogues in Chinook salmon ( Oncorhynchus tshawytscha ), and assess their modulation by a phytobiotic functional feed under commercial farming conditions. Genome mining identified three functional HAMP and three LEAP2 paralogues in Chinook salmon, all retaining conserved features typical of their respective peptide families and arising from salmonid‐specific genome duplication events. Constitutive expression analysis revealed liver‐dominant expression of HAMP, whereas LEAP2 paralogues exhibited distinct tissue‐specific profiles, with LEAP2.1 and LEAP2.2 expressed predominantly in the liver and skin, and LEAP2.3 largely restricted to gills and skin. A six‐month feeding trial using a functional diet supplemented with the phytobiotic NatControl™ resulted in marked tissue‐ and paralogue‐specific upregulation of AMP gene expression. HAMP expression was upregulated across multiple immune‐relevant tissues, including head kidney, skin, spleen, liver and gills. LEAP2 paralogues also showed clear dietary responsiveness, with LEAP2.1 and LEAP2.2 upregulated in the liver and kidney, and LEAP2.3 showing strong upregulation in gills. Despite these molecular responses, no significant differences in growth or survival were observed between diet groups. Together, these findings provide the first integrated characterisation of HAMP and LEAP2 systems in Chinook salmon, demonstrate their sensitivity to dietary immunomodulation and support their use as molecular biomarkers of functional immune priming. The results further indicate that NatControl™ acts as an effective immunostimulant, enhancing innate immune readiness without compromising growth performance under non‐challenging conditions.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究对奇努克鲑（Oncorhynchus tshawytscha）的HAMP和LEAP2抗菌肽基因家族进行了基因组鉴定，发现三个HAMP和三个LEAP2旁系同源基因，均具有保守结构特征。组织表达分析显示HAMP主要在肝脏表达，而LEAP2旁系同源基因呈现组织特异性分布。为期六个月的植物源功能饲料（NatControl™）投喂实验表明，该饲料能显著上调多个免疫相关组织中AMP基因的表达，且具有组织和旁系同源基因特异性，但未影响生长和存活率。研究首次系统表征了奇努克鲑的HAMP和LEAP2系统，证实其可作为功能性免疫启动的分子生物标志物。

papers.title: Satellite‐Based Modeling of Marine Productivity and Fisheries Habitat Conditions in the Northern Bay of Bengal
papers.authors: Abin, Tasnim Binth; Uddin, Mohammad Muslem; Mazumder, Priyanka
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT The Bay of Bengal (BoB) is a vital marine ecosystem that sustains diverse fisheries and significantly contributes to regional food security. This study investigates the spatiotemporal variability of marine primary productivity in the northern BoB and its environmental drivers—sea surface temperature (SST), sea surface salinity (SSS), dissolved oxygen (DO), and chlorophyll‐a (Chl‐a). Multiseasonal Sentinel‐3 OLCI and SLSTR satellite datasets from 2024 were analyzed using correlation analysis, multiple linear regression, and ARIMA time‐series forecasting to assess how hydrographic variability influences phytoplankton dynamics. The results show that winter exhibits the highest phytoplankton biomass (Chl‐a up to 1.50–3.02 mg m −3 ), driven by low SST, elevated DO, and freshwater discharge that enhance vertical mixing and nutrient availability. Statistical analysis revealed that SST appears to be a significant driver during the monsoon ( p = 0.012), whereas DO showed a significant association with productivity ( p = 0.002), which may reflect favorable environmental conditions rather than a direct biological causation as phytoplankton produce oxygen. During summer, stratification may have contributed to the suppression of productivity, and a multivariate statistical link ( R 2 = 0.78) reflected combined effects of SST, SSS, and DO. ARIMA forecasting indicated a short‐term increase in Chl‐a (1.62–2.28 mg m −3 ), suggesting continued favorable production trends. Seasonal hydrographic variability therefore regulates habitat suitability, influencing spawning, feeding, and migration of hilsa, sardine, anchovy, mackerel, and juvenile tuna. Integrating satellite‐based monitoring with predictive modeling supports climate‐resilient fisheries management and reinforces ecosystem‐based governance. The outcomes contribute to multiple sustainability targets, including SDG 14 (Life Below Water), SDG 13 (Climate Action), SDG 2 (Zero Hunger), and SDG 1 (No Poverty).
papers.summary_cn: 利用2024年多季节Sentinel-3卫星数据，研究孟加拉湾北部海洋初级生产力的时空变化及其环境驱动因子（SST、SSS、DO、Chl-a）。冬季浮游植物生物量最高（Chl-a达1.50–3.02 mg m⁻³），由低温、高溶氧和淡水输入驱动；SST在季风期显著影响生产力（p=0.012），DO与生产力显著相关（p=0.002）。ARIMA预测显示Chl-a短期上升（1.62–2.28 mg m⁻³），表明生产力持续向好。该研究为黄鱼、沙丁鱼等经济鱼类的栖息地适宜性评估及气候适应性渔业管理提供支持。

papers.title: <p>Toward Climate-Informed Fisheries Assessment: Integrating Oceanographic Variables into Frigate Tuna Stock Assessment in the Southeast Atlantic Ocean</p>
papers.authors: Konoyima, Komba Jossie
papers.journal: Cureus Journal of Agriculture and Food Science
papers.summary_cn: 本研究旨在将海洋环境变量纳入东南大西洋鲣鱼资源评估，以提升气候变化背景下的渔业管理适应性。通过整合海表温度、叶绿素浓度等海洋学因子，改传统stock assessment模型为气候信息驱动。主要发现：环境变量显著影响鲣鱼种群动态，纳入后模型拟合度与预测精度均优于传统方法。

papers.title: Indices of reduced fish biomass, changes in fish biodiversity and seafloor macrolitter – implications for fisheries management in Sri Lanka
papers.authors: Krakstad, Jens Otto; Jayasinghe, Prabath; Beck, Alexander Christian; Misund, Ole Arve
papers.abstract: The Norwegian research vessel “Dr. Fridtjof Nansen” operating under United Nations flag, conducted four surveys in the waters of Sri Lanka from 1978 – 2018. During the three first surveys carried out annually in 1978 - 1980, a total fish abundance of about 280 000 – 395 000 tons were measured by fisheries acoustics. From the first two surveys signals of potential increases in catches by a factor of two, and use of longlining for catch of deepwater rock fishes were given. In the 2018 survey with the larger and better equipped third “Dr. Fridtjof Nansen”, the total fish abundance recorded by fisheries acoustics was just 121–000 tons, and an additional 52 000 tons estimated by the bottom trawl swept area method. These numbers indicated a drastic reduction in the standing biomass of fish species off Sri Lanka during this forty-year period. Total catch per unit effort declined from the 1978–1980 surveys to the 2018 survey, especially for six common fish families. However, for ten other fish families the catch per unit of effort increased. For eight commercially important fish species average length had decreased by about 50% from the 1978–1980 surveys to the 2018 survey. For seven other fish species the average length seems generally to have increased during this forty-year period. Macro-litter as plastic waste and remains of fishing gears were common in the 2018 bottom trawls. Our results support further development of fisheries management plans with harvest control rules as tools to support the sustainability of Sri Lankan fisheries and environmental action plans to reduce macro litter accumulation on the seabed.
papers.summary_cn: 基于1978-2018年四次"弗里德约夫·南森"号调查数据，斯里兰卡海域鱼类总生物量从28-39.5万吨（1978-1980年）骤降至12.1万吨（2018年），底拖网法另估算5.2万吨。六种常见鱼类的CPUE显著下降，但十种鱼类CPUE上升；八种商业鱼类的平均体长减少约50%，而七种鱼类体长增加。海底塑料垃圾和渔具残骸（macrolitter）普遍存在。研究建议制定含捕捞控制规则的渔业管理计划，并实施减少海底垃圾的环境行动方案。
